word: a. 灵巧的， 熟练的
translation: n.  灵巧， 机敏
n. 放任；狂热；v. 遗弃；放弃
example: He approached life with reckless abandon–I don't think he himself knew what he was going to do next. 他以不计后果的放纵态度对待生活–我想他自己都不知道他接下来要做什么。

translation: v. 使…谦卑；降低…的品格；降低…的地位
v. 使困窘；使羞愧；使局促不安
v. 减轻；减少；废除；n. (Abate)人名；(英、意、法、埃塞)阿巴特
example: We waited for the storm to abate. 我们等风暴减弱。

translation: n. 女修道院院长；女庵主持
example: The superior of an abbey is called an abbess. 修道院的院长被称为女修道院院长。

translation: n. 大修道院，大寺院；修道院中全体修士或修女
v. 缩写，使省略；使简短
v. 退位；放弃
example: King Alfonso XIII abdicated in favour of his eldest son. 国王阿方索十三世把王位让给了长子。

translation: n. 腹部；下腹；腹腔
example: He went into the hospital to undergo tests for a pain in his abdomen. 他去了医院接受对他的腹部疼痛进行的各项检查。

translation: adj. 腹部的；有腹鳍的
example: ...vomiting, diarrhoea, and abdominal pain. …呕吐、腹泻和腹部疼痛。

translation: n. 诱拐，绑架；诱导
adv. 在床上；n. (Abed)人名；(法)阿贝；(阿拉伯)阿比德
n. 失常；离开正路，越轨
example: It became very clear that the incident was not just an aberration; it was not just a single incident. 已经很明确这次事件并不仅仅是一次失常，也不只是一个单独的事件。

translation: v. 煽动，教唆；支持；n. (Abet)人名；(意)阿贝特；(匈)奥拜特
n. 中止，停顿；归属待定，暂搁
n. 痛恨，厌恶
example: They are anxious to show their abhorrence of racism. 他们急于表现对种族主义的憎恶。

translation: adj. 可恶的；厌恶的；格格不入的
example: Racial discrimination is abhorrent to my council and our staff. 我的地方政府和全体工作人员与种族歧视水火不容。

translation: n. 持续；遵守；居住
adj. 卑鄙的；可怜的；不幸的；（境况）凄惨的，绝望的
example: an abject apology 低声下气的道歉

translation: v. 发誓放弃；公开放弃；避免
example: ...a formal statement abjuring military action. ...一个宣布撤回军事行动的正式声明。

translation: n. 洗礼；洗澡（常用复数）；斋戒沐浴
v. 放弃；舍弃；禁忌
adj. 反常的，不规则的；变态的
example: abnormal behaviour 反常行为

translation: adj. 讨厌的；令人憎恶的；糟透的
example: abominable cruelty 令人发指的暴行

translation: v. 痛恨；憎恶
example: I abominate dancing. 我痛恨跳舞。

translation: n. 厌恶；憎恨；令人厌恶的事物
example: Slavery was an abomination. 奴隶制令人深恶痛绝。

translation: adj. 土著的；原始的；n. 土著居民；土生生物
example: ...Aboriginal art. …土著艺术。

translation: n. 土著；土著居民
v. 擦伤；磨损
example: My skin was abraded and very tender. 我的皮肤被擦伤了，非常敏感。

translation: n. 磨损；磨耗；擦伤
example: She was treated for cuts and abrasions. 她因划伤和擦伤而接受治疗。

translation: v. 删节；缩短；节略
n. 节略，缩写；减少
v. 废除；取消
example: Both governments voted to abrogate the treaty. 两国政府均投票通过废除这项条约。

translation: adj. 生硬的；突然的；唐突的；陡峭的
example: an abrupt change of plan 计划的突然改变

translation: v. 逃匿，潜逃；避债
example: He was ordered to appear the following day, but absconded. 他被传唤于第二天出庭，却逃跑了。

translation: n. 没有；缺乏；缺席；不注意
example: In the absence of any evidence, the police had to let Myers go. 警察没有证据，只好把迈尔斯放了。

translation: adj.  心不在焉的， 出神的
example: Grandad’s been getting rather absent-minded lately. 爷爷最近变得越发健忘了。

translation: n. 赦免；免罪
example: Pope Leo gave him absolution. 教皇列奥赦免了他的罪孽。

translation: v. 免除；赦免；宣告…无罪
example: A police investigation yesterday absolved the police of all blame in the incident. 警方昨天的调查为其开脱了在这件事故中所有的责任。

translation: v. 吸收；吸引；承受；理解；使…全神贯注
example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil. 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

translation: n. 吸收；全神贯注，专心致志
example: This controls the absorption of liquids. 这可以控制液体的吸收。

translation: v. 自制；放弃；避免
example: Three countries abstained in the vote. 三个国家在投票中弃权了。

translation: adj. 节约的，节省的；有节制的
example: The Norwegian adolescents who said they regularly use alcohol and cigarettes were no more likely to report acne than those who were abstemious. 说自己长了青春痘的那些经常抽烟喝酒的挪威青少年并不比说自己长了青春痘的有节制的孩子们多。

translation: n. 摘要；抽象；抽象的概念；adj. 抽象的；深奥的；v. 摘要；提取；使……抽象化；转移(注意力、兴趣等)；使心不在焉
example: Talking about crime in the abstract just isn’t enough. 抽象地谈论犯罪根本不足以说明问题。

translation: adj. 深奥的；难懂的
example: Maths is a mix of abstruse theory and detailed calculations. 数学既有深奥的理论，又有精密的计算。

translation: adj. 荒谬的；可笑的；n. 荒诞；荒诞作品
example: It seems an absurd idea. 这似乎是个荒唐的想法。

translation: n. 充裕，丰富
example: This area of Mexico has an abundance of safe beaches and a pleasing climate. 墨西哥的这个地区有大量的安全沙滩与宜人的气候。

translation: adj. 丰富的；充裕的；盛产
example: an abundant supply of fresh water 充足的淡水供应

translation: adj. 辱骂的；滥用的；虐待的
example: Smith denies using abusive language to the referee. 史密斯否认辱骂裁判。

translation: v. 邻接；毗邻；紧靠；n. (Abut)人名；(英、土)阿布特
n. 深渊；深邃，无底洞，地狱
example: The torrent, swollen by the melting snow, plunges into a tremendous abyss. 因融化的雪水而高涨的急流泻入一个巨大的深渊之中。

translation: adj. 学术的；理论的；学院的；n. 大学生，大学教师；学者
example: He possessed no academic qualifications. 他没有学历。

translation: n. 院士；大学生；学会会员；大学教师
n. 学院；研究院；学会；专科院校
example: the American Academy of Arts and Letters 美国艺术和文学学会

translation: v. 加入；同意；就任
v. 使……加快；使……增速
example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth 加快经济增长速度的措施

translation: n. 加速，促进；[物] 加速度
example: The latest model has excellent acceleration. 这款最新型号加速性能优异。

translation: v. 强调；重读
example: The photograph seemed to accentuate his large nose. 照片似乎突出了他的大鼻子。

translation: v. 使用；存取；接近；n. 进入；使用权；通路
example: Users can access their voice mail remotely. 用户可以远程获取语音邮件。

translation: adj. 易接近的；可进入的；可理解的
example: The island is only accessible by boat. 这个岛只有坐船才能到。

translation: n. 增加；就职；到达；v. 登记入册
n. 配件；附件；[法] 从犯；adj. 副的；同谋的；附属的
example: bathroom accessories such as mirrors and towel-rails 镜子和毛巾架等浴室配件

translation: v. 称赞；为…喝彩，向…欢呼；n. 欢呼，喝彩；称赞
example: His work was acclaimed by art critics. 他的作品得到艺术评论家的推崇。

translation: v. 服水土；适应新环境
example: Colleges have been slow to adjust to the challenges they’ve encountered, but are beginning to try new strategies, both to better acclimate students and to deal with the application problems. 学校在适应他们遇到的挑战上已经慢了，但也开始尝试一些新策略，在让学生更好的适应环境和处理入学申请问题上。

translation: n. 向上的斜坡；[建] 上斜
example: Why did Ford's accelerator always have an accidental failure on acclivity? 为什么福特的加速器在斜坡上总是有意外的出错？

translation: n. 荣誉；荣誉称号授予仪式；连谱号；称赞
example: The Nobel Prize has become the ultimate accolade in the sciences. 诺贝尔奖已成为科学界的最高荣誉。

translation: v. 容纳；使适应；供应；调解
example: He bought a huge house to accommodate his library. 他买了一座大房子来放他的藏书。

translation: n. 伴奏；伴随物
example: White wine makes an excellent accompaniment to fish. 白葡萄酒是吃鱼时绝佳的佐餐酒。

translation: n. 伴奏者；伴随者
example: In life, everybody has their moments of glory although they may go unnoticed like the accompanist. This does not mean, however, that they are any less important than anyone else. 在生活中，每个人都有着自己光辉的瞬间，虽然他们可能会与伴奏者一样不被人注目，但是，这并不意味着他们的重要程度会比其他人低。

translation: v. 陪伴，伴随；伴奏
example: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult. 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

translation: n. 同谋者，[法] 共犯
example: Witnesses said the gunman immediately ran to a motorcycle being ridden by an accomplice. 证人们说该枪手立即向由一名同犯驾驶的摩托车跑去。

translation: v. 完成；实现；达到
example: We have accomplished all we set out to do. 所有计划要做的事情，我们都已完成。

translation: v. 勾引；引诱；对…说话；搭讪
example: He was accosted by four youths and forced to give them all his money. 四个少年走上前来和他搭讪，逼迫他交出身上所有的钱。

translation: 对…负有责任；对…做出解释；说明……的原因；导致；（比例）占
n. 会计师；会计人员
example: The boss dropped an accountant from the payroll. 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

translation: v. 装备；供以军用品，供以服装
v. 授权；信任；委派；归因于
v. 累积；积聚
example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth. 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

translation: adj. 被诅咒的；讨厌的；可憎的
example: Study and investigation of this strange idiom lead to the mysterious point of intersection of regular society with society which is accursed. 对这种奇特语言深入的钻研能把人引向正常社会和那被诅咒的社会幽奥的交叉点。

translation: n. 控告，指控；谴责
example: The main accusation levelled against him was that he tried to avoid military service. 对他提出的主要指控是他想逃避兵役。

translation: adj. 非难的，指责的；控诉的，控告的
example: ...the accusatory tone of the questions. ...这些问题的非难语气。

translation: v. 控告，指控；谴责；归咎于

translation: adj. 习惯的；通常的；独有的；v. 使习惯于（accustom的过去分词）
example: The pans were in their accustomed places. 那些锅在老地方。

translation: adj. 尖刻的（等于acerb）；酸的；辛辣的
example: acerbic wit 尖刻的俏皮话

translation: n. 酸，涩；刻薄
example: The town, the old grey twilight towers enveloped in dark yellow amber. In the evening, the black acerbity to bury the newborn, expand the trip. 小城的余辉殆尽，灰旧的城楼笼罩在一片暗黄的琥珀色里。傍晚的黑涩，埋葬了新生的期待，扩大了旅行的心酸。

translation: adj. 消色差的；非染色质的；非彩色的
n. 酸；<俚>迷幻药；adj. 酸的；讽刺的；刻薄的
example: sulphuric acid 硫酸

translation: v. [化学] 酸化；变酸
example: Adding vinegar will acidify the solution. 加醋会使溶液变酸。

translation: v. 承认；答谢；报偿；告知已收到
example: The family acknowledge the need for change. 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

translation: n. 顶点，极点；最高点
example: the acme of perfection 尽善尽美

translation: n. [皮肤] 痤疮，[皮肤] 粉刺
example: She wore no makeup, and her face was dotted with acne. 她没有化妆，脸上长满了粉刺。

translation: adj. 声学的；音响的；听觉的；n. 原声乐器；不用电传音的乐器

translation: n. 声学；音响效果，音质

translation: v. 使熟悉；使认识

translation: n. 熟人；相识；了解；知道
example: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna. 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

translation: adj. 熟识的；知晓的；有知识的；v. 使了解（acquaint的过去分词）

translation: n. 默许；默从

translation: v. 获得；取得；学到；捕获

translation: n. 获得物，获得；收购

translation: n. 赦免；无罪开释；履行；尽职；（债务等的）清偿

translation: n. 面积，英亩数
example: The Palestinians would balk at that as far too much, even if they got the equivalent acreage back, perhaps adjacent to the Gaza Strip. 巴基斯坦方对于这个提议望而却步，即便他们能换回同样多的英亩数，还有可能得到加沙地带的邻近区域。

translation: adj. 辛辣的；苦的；刻薄的
example: a cloud of acrid smoke 一团刺鼻的烟雾

translation: n. 辛辣；尖刻；严厉

v. 开动（机器等）；促使，驱使；激励（人等）
example: He was actuated by violent jealousy. 强烈的忌妒心驱使着他。

translation: n. 聪明，敏锐

example: The housing shortage is more acute than first thought. 住房短缺情况比一开始想的要严重。

translation: adj. 固执的，坚强的；坚定不移的；坚硬无比的；n. 坚硬的东西；坚石
example: She begged me to change my mind, but I remained adamant . 她求我改变主意，但我坚决不肯。

translation: v. 加；增加；加起来；做加法；n. 加法，加法运算
example: If the mixture seems dry, add water. 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

translation: n. 附录，附件；补遗；附加物

example: I suppose the shock had addled his poor old brain. 我想这个打击已经使他可怜的老脑筋变糊涂了。

translation: v. 举出；引证
example: Let me adduce more evidence. 让我举出更多的证据。

translation: adj. 熟练的；擅长…的；n. 内行；能手
example: I’m afraid she’s also an adept liar. 恐怕她还是一个撒谎专家。

translation: v. 坚持；依附；粘着；追随
n. 坚持；依附；忠诚
example: Holdbrooks has more in common with his former colleagues than he realises: their allegiance to the army is matched by his adherence to faith. 霍德布鲁克与昔日同僚的相似之处比他意识到的还要多：他们对军队的效忠就好比他对信仰的坚持。

translation: n. 信徒；追随者；adj. 附着的；粘着的
example: The Nation of Islam and its most famous adherent, Malcolm X, preached a message of self-reliance and racial separatism. “伊斯兰民族”及其最著名的追随者马尔科姆∙艾克斯（Malcolm X）宣扬自力更生和种族分离。

translation: n. 粘附；支持；固定
n. 附属物；助手；修饰语；adj. 附属的
example: " Lyte urges caution as well."It MAY, in really big capitals, prove to be an adjunct to therapy, but there are a number of steps that need to be done. 我们在花费了大量的人力物力之后，也许，也许证明它可以成为一种附属的治疗手段，但是我们仍然有大量的工作要做。

translation: n. 严令；恳请；立誓
n. 调整，调节；调节器
example: a period of adjustment 一段调整期

translation: n. 副官，助手；adj. 辅助的
example: As adjutant I was responsible for his day-to-day programme. 作为副官，我有责任安排他的日常事务。

translation: n. 管理人；行政官
example: On Friday the company's administrators sought permission from a Melbourne court to keep operating. 在星期五，该公司的管理人员们从一家墨尔本法院取得了继续经营的许可。

translation: adj. 可容许的；可采纳的；可接受的
example: {"COLLOINEXA":["admissible evidence"]} 可采信的证据

translation: n. 进入；入场权；通道
example: Gaining admittance to the club was no easy matter. 获准进入那家俱乐部并非易事。

translation: v. 告诫；劝告
example: They admonished me for taking risks with my health. 他们告诫我不要拿自己的健康来冒险。

translation: n. 警告
example: She ignored the admonitions of her mother. 她无视母亲的警告。

translation: n. 忙乱，纷扰，麻烦
example: So without further ado, I’ll now ask Mr Davis to open the debate. 不再多说了，现在我请戴维斯先生开始辩论。

translation: n. 崇拜；爱慕
example: the look of adoration in his eyes 他爱慕的眼神

translation: v. 装饰；使生色；n. (Adorn)人名；(泰)阿隆
example: His watercolour designs adorn a wide range of books. 他的水彩设计装饰着各种各样的书籍。

translation: adj. 敏捷的，灵巧的；熟练的
example: an adroit negotiator 一个谈判高手

translation: v. 过分称赞；谄媚；奉承
adj. 阿谀的，奉承的；谄媚的

translation: n. 婉转曲折的说法，累赘的陈述；遁辞

example: For this year at least, our race to circumnavigate the globe in less than 80 days is over. 至少在今年，我们在八十天内完成环球航行结束了。

translation: v. 外切，外接；限制；在…周围画线
example: The President’s power is circumscribed by Congress and the Supreme Court. 总统的权力受到国会和最高法院的制约。

translation: adj. 细心的，周到的；慎重的
example: The banks should have been more circumspect in their dealings. 银行在交易时应更加谨慎。

translation: v. 包围；智取；绕行，规避
example: The company opened an account abroad, in order to circumvent the tax laws. 为规避税法，这家公司在国外开设了账户。

translation: n. 城堡；大本营；避难处
example: The citadel at Besançon towered above the river. 贝桑松城堡高过河面。

translation: v. 引用；传讯；想起；表彰
example: The passage cited above is from a Robert Frost poem. 以上的引文出自罗伯特•弗罗斯特的一首诗。

translation: n. 原告；[贸易] 索赔人；提出要求者
example: benefit claimants 救济金申请人

translation: n. 千里眼；异常的洞察力
example: The military initially focused on 'remote viewing', the scientific term for clairvoyance and extrasensory perception (or ESP). 军方最初致力于开发“遥视”能力，这是千里眼和超感知觉的科学术语（或称ESP）。

translation: adj. 吵闹的；大声要求的
example: There is always a clamorous din when I go to visit my father. 每当我去看视父亲的的时候，总有一个声音在那里大喊大叫。

translation: n. 宗族；部落；集团
example: the Campbell clan 坎贝尔家族

translation: adj. 秘密的，私下的；偷偷摸摸的
example: a clandestine affair 秘密关系

translation: n. 澄清，说明；净化
example: There have been a number of official changes and clarifications. 官方有过数次修改和说明。

translation: v. 澄清；阐明
example: Reporters asked him to clarify his position (= say exactly what his beliefs are ) on welfare reform. 记者们要求他阐明他在福利改革问题上的立场。

translation: n. 清楚，明晰；透明
example: Letters may be edited for length and clarity. 信件可能要加以修改以求篇幅合适，意思明了。

translation: v. 分类；分等
example: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’. 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

translation: n. 清洁
example: a high standard of cleanliness 很高的卫生标准

translation: n. 仁慈；温和；宽厚
n. 神职人员；牧师；僧侣
example: Thus, his preaching was directed at not only the laity, but the clergy as well. 因此，他的讲道面向的不只是世俗之人，也面向神职人员。

translation: n.  陈词滥调
example: There is plenty of truth in the cliché that a trouble shared is a trouble halved. “有人分担，烦恼减半”这句老话说得很有道理。

translation: n. 客户；诉讼委托人
example: This pub had a mixed clientele. 这家酒吧有混杂的顾客群。

translation: adv. 顺时针方向地；adj. 顺时针方向的
example: Screw the lid on clockwise. 按顺时针方向拧紧盖子。

translation: n. 衣庄；呢绒商
adj. 笨拙的
example: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt. 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

translation: n. 杂乱，混乱；v. 使凌乱；胡乱地填满
example: Could you get rid of some of that clutter in your bedroom? 你能把你卧室那些杂物清理掉一些吗？

translation: n. [建][化工] 促凝剂；凝血剂；凝结剂
v. 使…凝结
example: The blood had not coagulated. 血未凝结。

translation: n. 合并；联合；接合
example: Eventually, our group began to coalesce with other anti-abortion groups. The coalescence gave us a stronger voice, but we also lost an element of control over the group’s activities. 后来，我们的组织开始联合其他反堕胎组织，这一联合使我们的呼声更具威力，但组织活动还缺少些许控制。

translation: n. 联合；结合，合并
example: the centre-right coalition government 政治上中间偏右的联合政府

translation: v. 哄；哄诱；慢慢将…弄好
example: ‘Please, Vic, come with us,’ Nancy coaxed. “求你了，维克，跟我们一起去吧。”南希哄劝道。

translation: v. 娇养；溺爱（等于mollycoddle）；用文火煮
example: Don’t coddle the child – he’s fine! 别太娇惯那孩子——他没事的！

translation: n.  密码； 代码， 代号， 编码
example: The Torah is the basis for all the Jewish laws and their moral code . 《托拉》是所有犹太法律和道德规范的基础。

translation: n. 遗嘱的附录
example: In codicil, keep your plans somewhat flexible so that you can change ships at the last minute. 在遗嘱，让您的计划一定灵活性，以便您可以更改船舶在最后一分钟。

translation: n. [数] 系数；率；协同因素；adj. 合作的；共同作用的
example: In 8pq, the coefficient of pq is 8. 在8pq中pq的系数为8。

translation: v. 强制，迫使
example: Potter had argued that the government coerced him into pleading guilty. 波特曾争辩说是政府胁迫他认罪。

translation: n. 强制；强迫；高压政治；威压
example: The defendant explained that he had been acting under coercion. 被告辩解说他是受到胁迫才那么做的。

translation: adj. 强制的；胁迫的；高压的
example: coercive measures to reduce absenteeism 减少旷工现象的高压措施

translation: adj. 强有力的；使人信服的
example: Every decision has to be backed up with rational and cogent arguments. 每项决定都应该有合理和令人信服的论据做支持。

translation: v. 仔细考虑；谋划
adj. [地质] 同源的；同类的；n. 同族；同根词
example: This one branch is the Liberty of Thought: from which it is impossible to separate the cognate liberty of speaking and of writing. 这条支线就是思想的自由。 把同源的言语的自由与写作的自由和思想的自由分开是不可能的。

translation: adj. 认知的，认识的
example: cognitive psychology 认知心理学

translation: adj. 审理的；已认知的
example: We are cognizant of the problem. 我们认识到这个问题的存在。

translation: adj. 连贯的，一致的；明了的；清晰的；凝聚性的；互相耦合的；粘在一起的
example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole. 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

translation: n. 凝聚；结合；[力] 内聚力
example: a sense of community and social cohesion 社区意识和社会凝聚力

translation: adj. 凝聚的；有结合力的；紧密结合的；有粘着力的
example: a cohesive community 团结的社区

translation: v. 盘绕，把…卷成圈；n. 线圈；卷
example: The snake coiled around the branches of the tree. 这条蛇盘在树枝上。

translation: v. 一致，符合；同时发生
example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together. 我们的假期要是凑巧赶在一起，我们常常会一同去度假。

translation: n. 巧合；一致；同时发生
example: ‘I’m going to Appleby tomorrow.’ ‘ What a coincidence ! I’m going there too.’ “明天我要去阿普尔比。”“太巧了！我也要去那里。”

translation: v. 合作；勾结，通敌
example: Much later he collaborated with his son Michael on the English translation of a text on food production. 后来他和儿子迈克尔合作，把一个有关食品生产的文本翻译成英语。

translation: n. 合作；勾结；通敌
example: The company is building the centre in collaboration with the Institute of Offshore Engineering. 该公司正与海洋工程学院合建这座中心。

translation: n. 抽象拚贴画（用报纸、布、压平的花等碎片拼合而成的）；vt. 把…创作成拼贴画，拼贴
example: ...a collage of words and pictures from magazines. …用杂志上的词语和图片做成的拼贴画。

translation: n. [生化] 胶原，胶原质
example: During the first stage of wound healing, inflammation around the damaged area stimulates the production of a substance called collagen. 伤口愈合的第一个阶段，受损区域的炎症反应刺激一种叫做胶原蛋白的物质生成。

translation: v. 倒塌；瓦解；暴跌；n. 倒塌；失败；衰竭
example: Uncle Ted’s chair collapsed under his weight. 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

translation: n. 同事，同僚
example: a colleague of mine from the bank 我在银行的一位同事

translation: adj. 集体的；共同的；集合的；集体主义的；n. 集团；集合体；集合名词
example: a collective decision made by all board members 董事会所有成员作出的集体决定

translation: n. 学院的学生；学院的一员
example: I was an English collegian and now I work as a sales manager in a testing lab. 作为一名英语专业的学生，我现在已经是一家实验室的销售经理。

translation: v. 碰撞；抵触，冲突
example: A car and a van collided on the motorway. 一辆汽车和一辆小型货车在高速公路上相撞了。

translation: n. 矿工；运煤船
n. 碰撞；冲突；（意见，看法）的抵触；（政党等的）倾轧
example: Two people were killed in a head-on collision (= between two vehicles that are moving directly towards each other ) on highway 218. 218号公路上有两辆汽车迎面相撞，两人死亡。

translation: adj. 胶质的；n. [物化] 胶质
example: A colloid of life is the unknown factor between the animate and the inanimate." (Jubbs Cell Rejuvenation, p.14.) 生命胶质是介于生命体和非生命体的未知介质。

translation: adj. 白话的；通俗的；口语体的
example: ...a colloquial expression. …一个口语表达法。

translation: n. 白话，口语；口语体；方言用语
n. 以对话体写的文章；谈话，会话
n. 勾结；共谋
example: He found no evidence of collusion between record companies and retailers. 他找不出唱片公司与零售商互相勾结的证据。

translation: n. 巨像；巨人；巨大的东西
example: an intellectual colossus like Leonardo 像列奥纳多这样的智慧巨人

translation: n. 纵队，列；专栏；圆柱，柱形物
example: He writes a weekly column for ‘The Times’. 他每周为《泰晤士报》写一篇专栏文章。

translation: n. 结合；组合；联合；[化学] 化合
example: a combination nightclub and café 夜总会兼咖啡馆

translation: adj. 易燃的；易激动的；燃烧性的；n. 可燃物；易燃物
example: The ability of coal to release a combustible gas has long been known. 煤能够释放易燃气体这一点早已为人所知。

translation: n. 燃烧，氧化；骚动
example: The energy is released by combustion on the application of a match. 能量通过点火柴燃烧释放出来。

translation: adj. 清秀的，标致的
example: Here, a comely woman coach jogs alongside an inmate in the prison yard. 这儿，一个清秀的女子教练一起和犯人在监狱院子里慢跑。

translation: n. 食物；adj. 可吃的，可食的
example: A way of separating some comestible red pigment from the red turnip is studied by this paper. 本文以胭脂萝卜为原料进行食用红色素的提取研究。

translation: n. 食物；adj. 可吃的，可食的
example: In Brazil Nestlé sends its comestibles to local entrepreneurs who sell them to their neighbours. 在巴西，雀巢把食品运送到当地的企业家手中。 企业家再把食品卖给邻居。

translation: adj. 滑稽的，好笑的
example: The note of pure panic in his voice was almost comical. 他那种十分慌张的口气几乎有点滑稽。

translation: v. 庆祝，纪念；成为…的纪念
example: a parade to commemorate the town’s bicentenary 庆祝该镇建立200周年的游行

translation: n. 开始，发端；毕业典礼
example: All applicants should be at least 16 years of age at the commencement of this course. 所有申请人在本课程开始时应至少年满16岁。

translation: adj. 相称的；同量的；同样大小的
example: Employees are paid salaries commensurate with those of teachers. 发给雇员的薪水与发给教师的薪水相当。

translation: n. 评论；注释；评注；说明
example: political commentary 政论

translation: v. 使混合；掺和
example: Many towns allow recyclable items to be commingled for collection in a single container. 在许多城镇，可回收物品可以混放在一个容器里统一收走。

translation: v. 同情，怜悯
example: When I lost, he commiserated with me. 我失败时，他同情我。

translation: n. 委员会；佣金；犯；委任；委任状；v. 委任；使服役；委托制作
example: The Government set up a commission to investigate allegations of police violence. 政府成立了一个委员会调查对警察施暴行为的指控。

translation: v. 犯罪，做错事；把交托给；指派…作战；使…承担义务
example: Women commit fewer crimes than men. 女性犯罪比男性少。

translation: n. 承诺，保证；委托；承担义务；献身
example: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ? 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

translation: adj. 宽敞的；方便的
example: “The Coffee houses particularly are very commodious for a free Conversation, and for reading at an easie Rate all manner of printed News,” noted one observer. “尤其是咖啡馆，是一个非常宽敞的自由交谈之处，来阅读与评论形形色色的印刷新闻”，一个观察员指出。

translation: n. 商品，货物；日用品
example: agricultural commodities 农业商品

translation: n. 老生常谈；司空见惯的事；普通的东西；adj. 平凡的；陈腐的
example: Women’s groups have become a commonplace. 妇女团体已经成了常见事物。

translation: n. 骚动；暴乱
example: He heard a commotion outside. 他听到外面一阵骚动。

translation: adj. 交际的；爱说话的，健谈的；无隐讳交谈的
example: Tom wasn’t very communicative, and kept himself to himself. 汤姆不大善于言谈，不喜欢与人交往。

translation: n. 社区；[生态] 群落；共同体；团体
example: The new arts centre will serve the whole community. 这座新的艺术中心将为整个社区服务。

translation: v. （搭乘车、船等）通勤；代偿；n. 通勤（口语）
example: Baldry’s 20-year prison sentence was commuted to three years. 鲍德里二十年的刑期被减至三年。

translation: adj. 可比较的；比得上的
example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad. 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

translation: adj. 比较的；相当的；n. 比较级；对手
example: After a lifetime of poverty, his last few years were spent in comparable comfort. 他穷了一辈子，最后几年还算过得比较舒适。

translation: n. 比较；对照；比喻；比较关系
example: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) . 她的画作让人想起早期的印象派作品。

translation: adj. 慈悲的；富于同情心的；v. 同情；怜悯
example: a caring, compassionate man 有同情心并关爱他人的人

translation: adj. 引人注目的；强制的；激发兴趣的；v. 强迫；以强力获得（compel的ing形式）
example: His life makes a compelling story . 他的一生是个引人入胜的故事。

translation: v. 补偿，赔偿；抵消
example: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate. 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

translation: n. 能力，胜任；权限；作证能力；足以过舒适生活的收入
example: Typing is considered by most employers to be a basic competence. 大多数雇主认为打字是一项基本技能。

translation: adj. 竞争的；比赛的；求胜心切的
example: Competitive sports encourage children to work together as a team. 竞技体育鼓励孩子们进行团队协作。

translation: n. 竞争者，对手
example: Last year they sold twice as many computers as their competitors. 去年他们的计算机销量是竞争对手的两倍。

translation: n. 满足，自满；沾沾自喜
example: What you’re hearing is the voice of complacence. 你听到的是沾沾自喜的声音。

translation: adj. 自满的；得意的；满足的
example: There’s a danger of becoming complacent if you win a few games. 赢了几场比赛可能就会变得沾沾自喜。

translation: n. 抱怨；诉苦；疾病；委屈
example: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager. 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

translation: n. 殷勤；彬彬有礼；柔顺
adj. 彬彬有礼的；顺从的；殷勤的
n. 补语；余角；补足物；v. 补足，补助
example: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser. 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

translation: adj. 补足的，补充的
example: The computer and the human mind have different but complementary abilities. 电脑与人脑各不相同，却又互为补充。

translation: adj. 复杂的；合成的；n. 复合体；综合设施
example: a complex system of highways 复杂的公路网

translation: adj. 顺从的；服从的；应允的
example: For years I had tried to be a compliant and dutiful wife. 多年来我都在努力做一个顺从尽职的妻子。

translation: v. 使复杂化；使恶化；使卷入
n. 并发症；复杂；复杂化；混乱
example: The fact that the plane was late added a further complication to our journey. 飞机误点给我们的旅行带来了更大的麻烦。

translation: n. 共谋；串通；共犯关系
example: Recently a number of policemen were sentenced to death for their complicity in the murder. 近来很多警察因参与这起谋杀而被判死刑。

translation: n. 恭维；称赞；问候；致意；道贺；v. 恭维；称赞
example: All the guests paid her extravagant compliments. 所有客人都对她赞不绝口。

translation: adj. 组成的，构成的；n. 成分；组件；[电子] 元件
example: Gorbachev failed to keep the component parts of the Soviet Union together. 戈尔巴乔夫没能使苏联各组成部分保持在一起。

translation: v. 行为；举动
example: He comported himself in a way that won him respect. 他的行为为自己赢得了尊重。

translation: adj. 镇静的；沉着的；v. 组成；作曲（compose的过去分词）；著作
example: He appeared very composed despite the stress he was under. 尽管压力很大，他看起来仍十分镇定。

translation: n. 镇静；沉着
example: He has lost his composure under the pressure of the situation. 他不堪形势的压力，失去了冷静。

translation: n. [化学] 化合物；混合物；复合词；adj. 复合的；混合的；v. 合成；混合；恶化，加重；和解，妥协
example: man-made organic compounds 人造有机化合物

translation: v. 理解；包含；由…组成
example: She cannot comprehend the extent of the disaster. 她无法理解这场灾难的严重程度。

translation: adj. 可理解的
example: Her speech was slurred and barely comprehensible. 她的发言含混不清，几乎无法听懂。

translation: adj. 综合的；广泛的；有理解力的；n. 综合学校；专业综合测验
example: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products. 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

translation: v. 受压缩小
example: Light silk is best for parachutes, as it compresses well and then expands rapidly. 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

translation: adj. 可压缩的；可压榨的
example: compressible, since text files such as SQL or properties are highly redundant 可压缩，因为文本文件，如SQL或配置文件压缩率很高

translation: n. 压缩，浓缩；压榨，压迫
example: If so, they still generate a compression dictionary, but in this case, there is no compressed record, as all data has already been moved into the table. 如果有，那么它们仍然生成一个压缩字典，但是在这里，没有被压缩的记录，因为所有数据已经被移到表中。

translation: v. 包含；由…组成
example: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room. 这座房子有两间卧室、一间厨房和一间起居室。

translation: v. 妥协；危害；n. 妥协，和解；折衷
example: She admitted that she was unable to compromise. 她承认自己无法作出妥协。

translation: n. 强制；强迫；强制力

translation: n. 领域；域名；产业；地产

translation: n. 圆屋顶；vi. 成圆顶状；vt. 加圆屋顶于…上
example: ...the dome of the Capitol. …国会大厦的穹顶。

translation: adj. 国内的；家庭的；驯养的；一心只管家务的；n. 国货；佣人
example: Unfortunately his domestic life wasn’t very happy. 不幸的是，他的家庭生活并不幸福。

translation: n. 优势；统治；支配
example: The latest fighting appears to be an attempt by each group to establish dominance over the other. 最近的战斗似乎是冲突各方在试图争夺控制权。

translation: adj. 显性的；占优势的；支配的，统治的；n. 显性
example: The dominant male gorilla is the largest in the group. 领头的公猩猩是这群大猩猩中体形最大的一个。

translation: v. 控制；支配；占优势；在…中占主要地位
example: The industry is dominated by five multinational companies. 这个行业受五家跨国公司控制。

translation: v. 跋扈；作威作福
example: It pleased me to domineer over her, and she generally submitted to my tyranny rather than risk a hand-to-hand encounter. 我喜欢对她作威作福，而她通常宁可屈从我的专横，不愿冒著和我直接冲突的危险。

translation: v. 捐赠；捐献；n. 捐赠；捐献
example: people who volunteer to donate blood 自愿献血者

translation: n. [生物] 休眠，冬眠；[生物] 蛰伏
adj. 休眠的；静止的；睡眠状态的；隐匿的；n. (Dormant)人名；(法)多尔芒
example: a huge dormant volcano 一座巨大的休眠火山

translation: adj. 严厉的；顽强的；阴沉的；不爱讲话的；n. (Dour)人名；(法)杜尔
example: ...a dour, taciturn man. …一个阴沉、寡言的男人。

translation: v. 不予重视；将轻描淡写

translation: n. 排水；排水系统；污水；排水面积
example: A handful of pebbles in the bottom of a flowerpot will help drainage. 在花盆底下放一把鹅卵石能够帮助排水。

translation: adj. 戏剧的；急剧的；引人注目的；激动人心的
example: A superb goal by Owen earned United a dramatic victory yesterday. 昨天欧文的一个超级入球为联队赢得了激动人心的胜利。

translation: adj. 激烈的；猛烈的；n. 烈性泻药
example: drastic cuts in government spending 政府开支的急剧削减

translation: n. 干旱；缺乏
example: ...a country where drought and famines have killed up to two million people during the last eighteen years. …过去18年来干旱和饥荒致死达两百万人的一个国家。

translation: adj. 昏昏欲睡的；沉寂的；催眠的
example: The drug can make you drowsy. 这种药会让人昏昏欲睡。

translation: v. 用棒打；硬灌；打击
n. 苦工，苦差事
example: People want to get away from the drudgery of their everyday lives. 人们想摆脱日常生活中的苦差事。

translation: adj. 双的；双重的；n. 双数；双数词

translation: adj. 可疑的；暧昧的；无把握的；半信半疑的
example: The firm was accused of dubious accounting practices. 该公司被指控有不诚实的会计行为。

translation: adj. 柔软的；易教导的；易延展的
n. 笨蛋；愚人
example: In this well-educated family, Darwin was considered to be rather dull. At one time his school headmaster called him a dullard. 在这个很有文化涵养的家庭里，达尔文被看成是相当地迟钝。有一次，他的校长称他是笨蛋。

translation: v. 使惊呆；使人惊愕失声
example: This suggestion dumbfounded Joe. 这个建议使乔伊惊呆了。

translation: v. 复制；使加倍；n. 副本；复制品；adj. 复制的；二重的
example: New copies of the form can be duplicated from a master copy. 可以用原件来复制新的表格。

translation: n. 口是心非；表里不一；不诚实
n. 持续，持续的时间，期间
example: The course is of three years’ duration. 该课程为期三年。

translation: v. 变矮小；n. 侏儒，矮子；adj. 矮小的
example: The cathedral is dwarfed by the surrounding skyscrapers. 周围的摩天大楼使得大教堂显得很矮小。

translation: v. 减少；变小
example: The elephant population is dwindling. 大象的数量在减少。

translation: adj. 动态的；动力的；动力学的；有活力的；n. 动态；动力
example: a dynamic and unstable process 不断变化的、不稳定的过程

translation: adj. 认真的，热心的；重要的；n. 认真；定金；诚挚
example: a rather earnest young man 相当认真的一个年轻人

translation: n. [无脊椎] 蚯蚓
example: The earthworm is a useful animal. On the ground it is food for other animals. Under the ground, it makes rich soil for fields and gardens. 蚯蚓是一种有益的动物。在地面上它是其他动物的食物。在地下，它为田园和花园制造肥沃的土壤。

translation: n. 衰退；退潮；衰落；v. 衰退；减少；衰落；潮退
example: His confidence is at a low ebb. 他的信心很低落。

translation: n. 奔放；兴高采烈；沸腾；冒泡
adj. 热情洋溢的；沸腾的
example: ...the ebullient Russian president. …精力充沛的俄罗斯总统。

translation: adj. 古怪的，反常的；n. 古怪的人
example: His eccentric behaviour lost him his job. 他古怪的行为使他丢了工作。

translation: v. 反射；重复；n. 回音；效仿
example: ‘You bet,’ she said, echoing his words. “当然啦。她重复着他的话。

translation: adj. 折衷的；选择的；折衷学派的；n. 折衷派的人；折衷主义者
example: galleries with an eclectic range of styles and artists 收藏各个流派和艺术家作品的美术馆

translation: v. 使黯然失色；形成蚀；n. 日蚀，月蚀；黯然失色

translation: adj. 经济的，经济上的；经济学的
example: Economic growth is slow. 经济增长缓慢。

translation: adj. 经济的；节约的；合算的
example: A small car is more economical to run. 开小型汽车比较省油。

translation: n. 生态系统
example: ...the forest ecosystem. …森林生态系统。

translation: adj. 狂喜的；入迷的；n. 狂喜的人
example: an ecstatic welcome from the thousands who lined the streets 数千人狂热的夹道欢迎

translation: n. 边缘；优势；刀刃；锋利；v. 使锐利；将…开刃；给…加上边
example: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge. 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

translation: adj. 可食用的；n. 食品；食物
example: These berries are edible, but those are poisonous. 这些浆果可以吃，但那些有毒。

translation: v. 熏陶；启发；教诲
v. 引出；演绎；使显出
v. 抹去，抹掉；使自己不受人注意
example: Nothing can efface the last picture I have of them from my mind. 没有什么能抹去他们在我脑海中留下的最后印象。

translation: adj. 奏效的；会应验的；有法律效力的
example: This is the only effectual way to secure our present and future happiness. 这是确保我们现在和未来幸福的唯一有效途径。

translation: adj. 柔弱的；女人气的；n. 女子气的男人；vt. 使柔弱；使无男子汉气概；vi. 变得无男子汉气概；变得柔弱
example: ...a skinny, effeminate guy in lipstick and earrings. ...一个抹口红、戴耳环，骨瘦如柴的娘娘腔男人。

translation: adj. 冒泡的，沸腾的；兴奋的
example: an effervescent personality 活泼乐观的个性

translation: adj. 衰老的；疲惫的；（土地）贫瘠的；（动植物）不育的
example: effete intellectuals 软弱的知识分子

translation: adj. 有效的；灵验的
example: an equally efficacious method of treatment 同样有效的治疗方法

translation: n. 功效，效力
example: Recent medical studies confirm the efficacy of a healthier lifestyle. 近来的医学研究证实了更健康的生活方式的功效。

translation: n. 雕像，肖像
example: In Paraguay, people create an effigy and dress him up like a scarecrow when the new year comes. 每逢新年来临，巴拉圭人都会专门制作雕像，然后把雕像打扮成稻草人的样子。

translation: n. 厚颜无耻
example: The man had the effrontery to be sarcastic. 那个男人有冷嘲热讽的放肆劲。

translation: n. 灿烂；光辉
example: Trust us! Work together, We'll be effulgence in the future path of cooperation. 相信我们！在未来携手合作的事业道路上，我们一定风光无限、灿烂辉煌！

translation: v. 流出；涌出；泻出；adj. [植] 疏展的
n. 渗出；泻出；渗漏物
example: a massive effusion of poisonous gas 毒气的大量逸出

translation: adj. 流出的；感情横溢的
example: Our host gave us an effusive welcome. 主人热情地欢迎我们。

translation: adj. 平等主义的；n. 平等主义；平等主义者
example: an egalitarian society 人人平等的社会

translation: adj. [心理] 自我中心的；利己主义的；n. 利己主义者
example: He was egocentric, a man of impulse who expected those around him to serve him. 他自我中心，易冲动，希望周围的人为他服务。

translation: n. 利己主义，自我主义
example: The impossibility of disproving egoism may sound like a virtue of the theory, but, as philosophers of science know, it’s really a fatal drawback. 无法否定利己主义可能听上去像是这种理论的优点，但正如科学哲学家所知，这其实是一个致命的缺点。

translation: adj. 惊人的；过分的；恶名昭彰的
example: ...the most egregious abuses of human rights. ...最恶劣的人权侵犯。

translation: v. 喷射；驱逐，逐出
example: Two engines cut out and the plane started to eject fuel as it lost height. 两个发动机突然熄火，飞机在下降的同时开始喷出燃料。

translation: v. 消逝；时间过去；n. 流逝；时间的过去
example: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial. 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

translation: n. 弹性；弹力；灵活性
example: the skin’s natural elasticity 皮肤天生的弹性

translation: adj. 兴高采烈的；得意洋洋的；v. 使兴奋（elate的过去式和过去分词）
example: He felt elated and mildly drunk. 他感到欢欣鼓舞，而且喝得有点醉了。

translation: n. 电气化；带电；充电
example: ...rural electrification. …乡村电气化。

translation: n. 顽皮雷弹
n. [化学] 电解，[化学] 电解作用；以电针除痣
n. 电解液，电解质；电解
example: That generates electricity and causes the metals to recombine in the electrolyte. 这会产生电流并使金属在电解液中重新合成。

translation: n. 电磁体，[电] 电磁铁；电磁石
n. 电子
example: Most things are balanced - with equal numbers of electrons and protons. 大部分物体都是电荷平衡的——含等量的电子和质子。

translation: n. [电] 验电器

translation: n. 元素；要素；原理；成分；自然环境
example: Business and management elements are built into the course. 本课程加入了商务和管理方面的内容。

translation: v. 提升；举起；振奋情绪等；提升…的职位
example: Language has elevated humans above the other animals. 语言使人类高于其他动物。

translation: adj. 提高的；高尚的；严肃的；欢欣的；v. 提高；抬起；振奋；提拔（elevate的过去分词）；n. 高架铁路
example: elevated philosophical language 充满智慧的哲学语言

translation: v. 抽出，引出；引起
example: When her knock elicited no response, she opened the door and peeped in. 敲门没有回应，她便推开门往里张望。

translation: adj. 合格的，合适的；符合条件的；有资格当选的；n. 合格者；适任者；有资格者
example: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor. 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

translation: v. 消除；排除
example: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

translation: adj. 椭圆的；省略的
example: Kepler published his discovery of the elliptical orbits of planets in 1609. 1609 年开普勒公布他的发现，认为行星轨道为椭圆形。

translation: n. 朗诵法；演说法；雄辩术
example: When I was 11 my mother sent me to elocution lessons. 在我11岁的时候，妈妈把我送去学习演说技巧课程。

translation: n. 演说家；雄辩家；朗诵者
example: He is not only a senior leader, CEO and leadership coach of his team in excellent enterprise but also a outstanding educator, elocutionist and author of many famous leadership literatures. 他不仅为全球卓越企业的高层领导者、CEO及其管理团队担任领导力教练，同时也是一位杰出的教育家和演说家，以及多部领导力著作和文献的作者。

translation: v. 拉长；使延长；使伸长；adj. 伸长的；延长的
example: Her legs were elongated by the very high heels which she wore. 她穿的高跟鞋非常高，使她的腿显得长了。

translation: n. 口才；雄辩；雄辩术；修辞
v. 阐明；说明
example: The full picture has not yet been elucidated. 详细情况还没有解释清楚。

translation: v. 逃避，躲避
example: He eluded his pursuers by escaping into a river. 他逃到河里，甩掉了追踪他的人。

translation: adj. 难懂的；易忘的；逃避的；难捉摸的
example: She enjoys a firm reputation in this country but wider international success has been elusive. 她在这个国家享有稳固的声誉，但却一直难以在国际上取得更大的成功。

translation: adj. 瘦弱的；憔悴的；v. 憔悴；消瘦下去（emaciate的过去分词）
example: The prisoners were ill and emaciated. 囚犯们疾病缠身，骨瘦如柴。

translation: v. 放射（过去式emanated，过去分词emanated，现在分词emanating，第三人称单数emanates，形容词emanative）；发散
example: Intelligence and cunning emanated from him. 聪明和机灵从他身上散发出来。

translation: v. 解放；释放
example: Slaves were emancipated in 1834. 奴隶于1834年获得了解放。

translation: n. 解放；释放
example: We must arouse them to fight for their own emancipation. 我们必须使他们行动起来为他们自己的解放而斗争。

translation: v. 禁止出入港口；禁止或限制贸易；征用或扣押；n. 禁令；禁止；封港令
example: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia. 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

translation: v. 使局促不安；使困窘；阻碍
example: He didn’t want to embarrass her by asking questions. 他不想提问让她尴尬。

translation: vt. 布阵；列阵；整军备战；严阵以待
v. 修饰；装饰；润色
example: The boat was embellished with carvings in red and blue. 这艘船饰有红、蓝雕刻。

translation: v. 盗用；挪用；贪污
example: Two managers were charged with embezzling $400,000. 两名经理被控挪用了40万美元。

translation: v. 使怨恨；使难受；使受苦
n. 象征；徽章；符号；vt. 象征；用符号表示；用纹章装饰
example: ...the emblem of the Soviet Union. …苏联的国徽。

translation: v. 体现，使具体化；具体表达；n. (Embody)人名；(英)恩博迪
example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher. 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

translation: v. 使有胆量，使大胆
example: Emboldened by her smile, he asked her to dance. 她的微笑让他鼓起勇气邀请她跳舞。

translation: v. 拥抱；信奉，皈依；包含；n. 拥抱
example: Jack warmly embraced his son. 杰克热情拥抱他的儿子。

translation: v. 使卷入；使混乱
example: Any hostilities could result in retaliation and further embroil U.N. troops in fighting. 任何敌对活动都可能会招致报复，进而使联合国部队卷入战斗中。

translation: v. 浮现；摆脱；暴露
example: The flowers emerge in the spring. 花儿在春天开放。

translation: n. 出现，浮现；发生；露头
n. 紧急情况；突发事件；非常时刻；adj. 紧急的；备用的
example: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies. 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

translation: adj. 紧急的；浮现的；意外的；自然发生的
example: the emergent nations of the world 世界上新成立的国家

translation: v. 移居；移居外国
example: He emigrated to Belgium. 他移民去了比利时。

translation: n. 显赫；卓越；高处
example: Many of the pilots were to achieve eminence in the aeronautical world. 其中的很多飞行员后来在航空界都取得了显赫的声名。

translation: v. 发出，放射；发行；发表
example: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle. 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

translation: n. [药] 润肤剂；软化剂；adj. 使柔软的
example: The choice of emollient should be made taking into account budgetary limitations and ease of supply. 选择润肤剂应考虑到预算的多少，以及是否容易供应。

translation: n. 情感；情绪
example: Her voice was full of emotion. 她的声音充满了激情。

translation: adj. 移情作用的；同感的（等于empathic）
example: ...Clinton's skills as an empathetic listener. ...克林顿作为一位感同身受倾听者的本领。

translation: n. 重点；强调；加强语气
example: a change of emphasis in government policy 政府政策重心的变化

translation: v. 强调，着重
example: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards. 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

translation: n. 经验主义；经验论
example: Action and experimentation are the cornerstones of empiricism. 行动和尝试是经验主义的基石。

translation: v. 授权，允许；使能够
example: The Voting Rights Act was needed to empower minority groups. 《选举权法案》对于赋予少数民族自主权是必不可少的。

translation: v. 仿真；模仿；尽力赶上；同…竞争；n. 仿真；仿效
example: He hoped to emulate the success of Wilder. 他希望效仿怀尔德的成功。

translation: v. 颁布；制定法律；扮演；发生
example: a drama enacted on a darkened stage 在灯光暗淡的舞台上演的戏剧

translation: v. 使迷恋，使倾心
v. 使迷惑；施魔法
example: ...Celtic stories of cauldrons and enchanted vessels. …凯尔特人关于神锅和魔法器皿的故事。

translation: v. 包含；包围，环绕；完成
example: The study encompasses the social, political, and economic aspects of the situation. 这项研究涵盖了这一局势的社会、政治和经济三方面。

translation: n. 再演唱的要求；经要求而再唱；v. 要求再演或唱；int. 再来一个
example: The band came back onstage for an encore. 乐队回到台上加演了一曲。

translation: v. 遭遇，邂逅；遇到；n. 遭遇，偶然碰见
example: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past. 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

translation: v. 蚕食，侵占
example: The shrubs encroached ever more on the twisting drive. 灌木丛蚕食了越来越多蜿蜒的车道。

translation: v. 阻塞；妨害；拖累
example: He died in 1874, heavily encumbered by debt. 他于1874年去世，负债累累。

translation: n. 百科全书（亦是encyclopaedia）
example: the Encyclopedia of Music 音乐百科全书

translation: v. 危及；使遭到危险
example: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life. 孕期吸烟会危及胎儿生命。

translation: adj. 地方性的；风土的；n. 地方病
example: Violent crime is now endemic in parts of Chicago. 芝加哥一些地区暴力犯罪成患。

translation: n. 内分泌；激素；内分泌物；adj. 内分泌的；激素的
example: Located near the base of the neck, the thyroid is a large endocrine gland that produces hormones that help control growth and metabolism. 甲状腺位于颈部的底部附近，是一个很大的内分泌腺体，它产生激素，协助控制生长和新陈代谢。

translation: v. 背书；认可；签署；赞同；在背面签名
example: I can endorse their opinion wholeheartedly. 我可以全心全意地支持他们的观点。

translation: v. 授予，赋予；穿上
adj. 能忍耐的；可忍受的；能持久的
n. 忍耐力；忍耐；持久；耐久
example: She was pushed beyond her powers of endurance. 她被逼得忍无可忍。

translation: v. 忍耐；容忍
example: It seemed impossible that anyone could endure such pain. 似乎谁都不可能忍受这样的疼痛。

translation: adj. 精力充沛的；积极的；有力的
example: an energetic man 精力旺盛的男子

translation: n. [物] 能量；精力；活力；精神
example: The water is heated using energy from the sun. 水是利用太阳能加热的。

translation: v. 使衰弱，使失去活力；adj. 衰弱的，无力的
example: The hot sun enervated her to the point of collapse. 热辣辣的太阳把她晒得快要晕过去了。

translation: v. 实施，执行；强迫，强制
example: Parking restrictions will be strictly enforced. 停车限制将会严格执行。

translation: v. 给予选举权；给予自治权；解放，释放
example: The company voted to enfranchise its 120 women members. 公司投票决定给予其120名女员工选举权。

translation: v. 使产生；造成
example: the changes in society engendered by the war 战争造成的社会变化

translation: v. 雕刻；铭记
example: Your wedding ring can be engraved with a personal inscription at no extra cost. 你的结婚戒指可以刻上个人题字不另收费。

translation: v. 使全神贯注；用大字体书写；正式写成（决议等）；独占；吸引
example: The scene was stunning, and for a time engrossed all our attention. 景色非常美丽，一时间把我们都完全吸引住了。

translation: adj. 引人入胜的；v. 使全神贯注（engross的ing形式）
example: He is an engrossing subject for a book. 他是非常有趣的写书题材。

translation: v. 提高；加强；增加
example: Good lighting will enhance any room. 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

translation: adj. 神秘的；高深莫测的；谜一般的
example: She starred in one of Welles's most enigmatic films. 她主演了威尔斯最神秘的电影当中的一部。

translation: v. 启发，启蒙；教导，开导；照耀
example: A few dedicated doctors have fought for years to enlighten the profession. 少数富有献身精神的医生为启蒙这一行业而奋斗多年。

translation: v. 支持；从军；应募；赞助
n. 敌意；憎恨
example: I think there is an historic enmity between them. 我认为他们之间存在着宿怨。

translation: adj. 庞大的，巨大的；凶暴的，极恶的
example: an enormous bunch of flowers 巨大的花束

translation: v. 激怒；使暴怒
example: Many readers were enraged by his article. 许多读者被他的文章激怒了。

translation: v. 使狂喜；使著迷
example: The place at once enraptured me. 这个地方立刻把我迷住了。

translation: v. 安置；安顿下来；使…隐藏
n. 全体；总效果；全套服装；全套家具；合奏组；adv. 同时
example: an attractive ensemble 一套漂亮的服装

translation: v. 诱捕；诱入陷阱；进入罗网
example: The spider must wait for prey to be ensnared on its web. 蜘蛛一定要耐心等待，直到猎物被它的蛛网困住。

translation: v. 保证，确保；使安全
example: facilities to ensure the safety of cyclists 确保骑车人安全的设施

translation: v. 使纠缠；卷入；使混乱
example: Bureaucracy can entangle applications for months. 官僚主义会使申请耽搁数月之久。

translation: n. 企业；事业；进取心；事业心
example: commercial enterprises such as banks and food manufacturers 银行和食品制造厂等商业企业

translation: v. 迷住，使着迷
v. 使登基；立…为王；任为主教；崇拜
example: Emperor Akihito of Japan has been enthroned in Tokyo. 日皇明仁已在东京登基。

translation: n. 狂热者，热心家
adj. 热情的；热心的；狂热的
example: an enthusiastic supporter of reform 改革的热心支持者

translation: n. 实体；存在；本质
example: The mind exists as a separate entity. 思想作为一个独立的实体存在。

translation: n. 入口；进入；v. 使出神，使入迷
example: the station entrance 车站的入口处

translation: n. 恳求；乞求
example: She declined the Republican Party's entreaties to run for his seat. 她拒绝了共和党让她竞选他的席位的数次恳求。

translation: v. 确立，牢固；用壕沟围住；挖掘
example: ...a series of measures designed to entrench democracy and the rule of law. …一系列旨在巩固民主和法制的举措。

translation: v. 列举；枚举；计算
example: I enumerate the work that will have to be done. 我将必须要做的工作一一列举出来。

translation: n. [生化] 酶
example: It is believed that it inhibits an enzyme that promotes cell proliferation in tumours. 据信它能抑制一种能在肿瘤中促进细胞增殖的酶的生成。

translation: adj. 短暂的；朝生暮死的；n. 只生存一天的事物
example: Fashion is by nature ephemeral. 从本质上说，时尚不过是一时的潮流。

translation: n. 老饕；美食家；享乐主义者
adj. 流行的；传染性的；n. 传染病；流行病；风尚等的流行
example: Over 500 people died during last year’s flu epidemic. 去年流感大暴发期间有五百多人死亡。

translation: n. 上皮，表皮
example: The pigment in the upper layer of skin (epidermis) that gives your skin its normal color is called melanin. 在浅层皮肤（表皮）中有种色素能让你的皮肤保持其正常的颜色，称为黑色素。

translation: n. 插曲；一段情节；插话；有趣的事件
example: Watch next week’s thrilling episode! 请收看下周精彩的一集！

translation: adj. 书信的；书信体的；用书信的
example: an epistolary novel 书信体小说

translation: n. 碑文，墓志铭
example: His epitaph for himself would have well suited man as he wanted him to be. 他为自己写的墓志铭非常适合像他所期望成为的那种人。

translation: n. 缩影；摘要；象征
v. 摘要；概括；成为…的缩影
example: This building epitomizes the spirit of the nineteenth century. 这栋建筑体现了19世纪的时代精神。

translation: n. 平等；相等；[数] 等式
example: ...equality of the sexes. …性别平等。

translation: n. 平静；镇定
example: He received the news with surprising equanimity. 他得到消息时显得异常镇静。

translation: n. 方程式，等式；相等；[化学] 反应式
example: In the equation 2x + 1 = 7, what is x? 在方程式2x+1=7中，x的值为多少？

translation: adj. 马的；骑马的；骑术的；n. 骑手；骑马者
example: equestrian sports 马术运动

translation: adj. 等角的
example: If you test by the triangle's angles, possible types are right, acute, obtuse, or equiangular. 如果您用三角形的角度进行测试，那么可能的类型是直角、锐角、钝角或等角三角形。

translation: adj. 等距的；距离相等的
example: Altus is equidistant from Ozark and Cotton Town. 从阿尔特斯到奥沙克和到棉花镇的距离是相等的。

translation: adj. 等边的；等面的；n. 等边形
example: ...an equilateral triangle. ...一个等边三角形。

translation: n. 均衡；平静；保持平衡的能力
example: The government is anxious not to upset the economic equilibrium. 政府急切希望不要打乱经济平衡。

translation: n. 设备，装备；器材
example: a shop selling camping equipment 出售露营装备的商店

translation: n. 平衡；均势
example: Are we at some kind of evolutionary equipoise as a species? 我们是否已经处于进化上的平衡， 作为一个物种？

translation: adj. 公平的，公正的；平衡法的
example: an equitable distribution of food supplies 所供应食品的合理分配

translation: adj. 等价的，相等的；同意义的；n. 等价物，相等物
example: I had no dollars, but offered him an equivalent amount of sterling. 我没有美金，但给了他等值的英镑。

translation: adj. 模棱两可的；可疑的
example: His answer was equivocal. 他的回答模棱两可。

translation: v. 说模棱两可的话；支吾， 躲闪；推诿；含糊其词
example: He is equivocating a lot about what is going to happen if and when there are elections. 他含含糊糊地说着很多如果进行选举会发生的状况。

translation: n. 时代；年代；纪元
example: His death marked the end of an era. 他的去世标志着一个时代的终结。

translation: v. 根除，根绝；消灭
example: an attempt to eradicate inflation 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

translation: v. 腐蚀，侵蚀
example: The cliffs are being constantly eroded by heavy seas. 悬崖正不断受到汹涌海浪的侵蚀。

translation: n. 侵蚀，腐蚀
example: the problem of soil erosion 水土流失的问题

translation: adj. 不定的；周游的；错误的；偏离正路的
example: Usually his cases involved errant husbands and wandering wives. 通常他接手的案子都涉及出轨的丈夫和离家出走的妻子。

translation: adj. 不稳定的；古怪的；n. 漂泊无定的人；古怪的人
example: His breathing was becoming erratic. 他的呼吸越来越不均匀。

translation: adj. 错误的；不正确的
example: His economic predictions are based on some erroneous assumptions. 他的经济预测是基于错误假设之上的。

translation: n. 误差；错误；过失
example: an error message 出错信息

translation: adj. 博学的；有学问的；n. 饱学之士
example: There’s also the intrinsic pleasure you get from boosting your knowledge and becoming more erudite. 这也有利于你发自内心地努力奋进获得更多学识变得更博学。

translation: v. 逐步增强；逐步升高
example: The costs were escalating alarmingly. 成本在以惊人的速度增长。

translation: v. 避免；避开；远避
example: I had eschewed politics in favour of a life practising law. 我选择从事律师职业，有意避开了政治。

translation: n. [解剖] 食管；[解剖] 食道
example: Do not attempt to force the dog to vomit as this can burn the esophagus and stomach and cause further complications. 不要试图强迫狗狗呕吐，因为这样会烧坏食管和胃，并更进一步引起并发症。

translation: adj. 秘传的；限于圈内人的；难懂的
example: ...esoteric knowledge. …深奥难懂的知识。

translation: v. 支持；嫁娶；赞成；信奉
example: She ran away with him to Mexico and espoused the revolutionary cause. 她与他一起逃到了墨西哥，支持革命事业。

translation: v. 看到；认出；发现；n. (Espy)人名；(英、法)埃斯皮
example: Here, from a window, did Guinevere espy a knight standing in a woodman's cart. 吉尼维尔是从这里透过窗户看到了站在樵夫车上的骑士。

translation: n. 本质，实质；精华；香精
example: In essence his message was very simple. 实质上他想表达的意思很简单。

translation: v. 尊敬；认为；考虑；估价；n. 尊重；尊敬
example: Peden was greatly esteemed by the people of Ayrshire. 佩登深受艾尔郡人的尊敬。

translation: v. 使疏远；离间
example: “Technology does not need to estrange us from one another,” Cox said. “The physical reality comes alive with the human stories we have told there.” “技术不会使我们彼此疏离，”考克斯说道，“当我们来到那些有故事的地点时，现实也就活灵活现了。”

translation: adj. 永恒的；不朽的
example: the Christian promise of eternal life 基督教承诺的永生

translation: n. 乙醚；[有化] 以太；苍天；天空醚
adj. 优雅的；轻飘的；缥缈的；超凡的
example: ethereal beauty 超凡的美丽

translation: adj. 伦理的；道德的；凭处方出售的；n. 处方药
example: The president must have the highest ethical standards. 总统必须具备最高的道德水准。

translation: n. 伦理学；伦理观；道德标准

translation: adj. 种族的；人种的
example: The school teaches pupils from different ethnic groups. 该校教授不同种族的小学生。

translation: v. 颂扬；称赞
example: The poem does not eulogize the dead soldiers. 这首诗并未歌颂阵亡的士兵。

translation: n. 委婉语；委婉说法
example: ‘Pass away’ is a euphemism for ‘die’. “去世”是“死”的委婉语。

translation: adj. 悦耳的
example: The sound of whistle is euphonious , emotional, and melodic. 口哨的音色悦耳动听，抒情性极强，极富歌唱性。

translation: v. 逃避；规避；逃脱
example: You can’t go on evading your responsibilities in this way. 你不能这样继续逃避责任。

translation: adj. 容易消散的；逐渐消失的；会凋零的
example: ...the evanescent scents of summer herbs. ...夏季香草逐渐消散的味道。

translation: v. 使……蒸发；使……脱水；使……消失

translation: n. 蒸发；消失

translation: adj. 永恒的；接连不断的
example: everlasting fame 永久的名声

translation: v. 驱逐；逐出
example: One cleric resigned over plans to evict the protesters forcibly, arguing that the Church should have been more supportive of their cause. 一位因为计划强行驱逐示威者而辞职的神职人员辩解说国教会应当给予他们更多的支持。

translation: n. 证据，证明；迹象；明显；v. 证明
example: Murrow’s evidence was enough to convict Hayes of murder. 默罗的证词足以证明海斯犯了谋杀罪。

translation: v. 引起，唤起；博得

translation: n. 演变；进化论；进展

translation: v. 发展，进化；进化；使逐步形成；推断出
example: Animals have evolved camouflage to protect themselves from predators. 动物进化形成了伪装，以保护自身不被捕食性动物所捕食。

translation: v. 使加剧；使恶化；激怒
example: The recession has exacerbated this problem. 经济衰退使这个问题更加严重。

translation: adj. 准确的，精密的；精确的；v. 要求；强求；急需
example: Police are still investigating the exact cause of the accident. 警方还在调查这起事故的确切原因。

translation: adj. 严格的；苛求的；吃力的；v. 逼取；急需（exact的ing形式）
example: She was an exacting woman to work for. 她是一位对下属要求严格的女性。

translation: v. 使扩大；使增大
example: He thinks I'm exaggerating. 他认为我在夸大其词。

translation: v. 恶化；使恼怒；激怒
example: It exasperates me to hear comments like that. 听到那样的评论令我恼怒。

translation: v. 挖掘；开凿
example: Schliemann excavated the ancient city of Troy. 谢里曼发掘出特洛伊古城。

translation: v. 超过；胜过
example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week. 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

translation: adj. 卓越的；极好的；杰出的
example: an excellent suggestion 极好的建议

translation: adj. 异常的，例外的；n. 超常的学生
example: an exceptional student 出类拔萃的学生

translation: n. 摘录，引用；v. 引用，摘录
example: ...an excerpt from Tchaikovsky's Nutcracker. …柴可夫斯基的《胡桃夹子》选段。

translation: n. 超过，超额；过度，过量；无节制；adj. 额外的，过量的；附加的
example: After you apply the oil, wait 20 minutes before wiping off any excess. 涂上油以后，等20分钟再擦掉多余部分。

translation: v. 排除；排斥；拒绝接纳；逐出
example: a special diet that excludes dairy products 不包含奶制品的特别食谱

translation: adj. 独有的；排外的；专一的；n. 独家新闻；独家经营的项目；排外者
example: Bel Air is an exclusive suburb of Los Angeles. 贝莱尔是洛杉矶郊外一处高级住宅区。

translation: v. 严厉的责难；擦破的皮肤
example: He proceeded to excoriate me in front of the nurses. 他继续在这些护士们面前指责我。

translation: n. 粪便，排泄物
example: The cage smelled of excrement. 这个笼子闻起来有粪便味。

translation: v. 开脱；使无罪
n. 偏移；远足；短程旅行；离题；游览，游览团
example: a shopping excursion 购物游

translation: v. 实行；执行；处死
example: 13 people were summarily executed (= killed without any trial or legal process ) by the guerrillas. 有13人被游击队员就地处决。

translation: adj. 典范的；惩戒性的；可仿效的
example: a company with an exemplary record on environmental issues 在处理环境问题方面可作为楷模的公司

translation: v. 免除；豁免；adj. 被免除的；被豁免的；n. 免税者；被免除义务者
example: So we have the current argument over how much of the derivative market will be exempt from regulation. 所以我们就看到了当前有关衍生产品市场到底有多大份额可以得到规则的豁免的辩论。

translation: v. 运用，发挥；施以影响
example: They exerted considerable influence within the school. 他们在校内施加了很大的影响力。

translation: v. 呼气；发出；发散；使蒸发
example: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly. 深吸一口气，然后慢慢呼出。

translation: v. 排出；耗尽；使精疲力尽；彻底探讨；n. 排气；废气；排气装置
example: A full day’s teaching exhausts me. 讲一整天课令我精疲力竭。

translation: adj. 疲惫的；耗尽的；v. 耗尽；用尽；使…精疲力尽（exhaust的过去式）
example: You look absolutely exhausted. 你看上去一副疲惫不堪的样子。

translation: adj. 详尽的；彻底的；消耗的
example: an exhaustive investigation 彻底的调查

translation: v. 使高兴，使振奋；使愉快
v. 发掘；掘出；n. (Exhume)人名；(法)埃克叙姆
example: His remains have been exhumed from a cemetery in Queens. 他的遗体已被从昆士郡的一个墓地里挖了出来。

translation: adj. 迫切的；紧急的；苛求的
v. 使免罪
adj. （要价等）过高的；（性格等）过分的；不在法律范围之内的
example: Exorbitant housing prices have created an acute shortage of affordable housing for the poor. 过高的房价使穷人负担得起的房源严重短缺。

translation: n. [昆] 外骨骼
example: An advanced onboard micro-computer ensures the exoskeleton moves in concert with the operator. 一种最先进的机载微型电脑确保了外骨骼与操作器一致移动。

translation: adj. 异国的；外来的；异国情调的
example: exotic birds 外国的奇异鸟类

translation: v. 扩张；使膨胀；详述

translation: v. 折叠；合拢；抱住；笼罩；n. 折痕；信徒；羊栏

translation: adj. 有勇无谋的；蛮干的

translation: n. 力量；武力；军队；魄力；v. 促使，推动；强迫；强加

translation: v. 预示；预感；预兆
example: can be, if I forebode aright, no power, short of the Divine mercy, to disclose, whether by uttered words, or by type or emblem, the secrets that may be buried with a human heart. 如果我的预感不错的话，除去上天的仁慈，没有什么力量，无论是通过讲出来的语言或是任何形式的标志，能够揭示可能埋在一个人心里的秘密。

translation: v. 预报，预测；预示；n. 预测，预报；预想

translation: n. 先见，远见；预见；深谋远虑

translation: n. 罚金；没收物；丧失的东西；adj. 因受罚而丧失的；被没收的；v. （因犯罪、失职、违约等）丧失（权利、名誉、生命等）
example: The company’s property may even be forfeit. 公司财产甚至可能被没收。

translation: n. 伪造；伪造罪；伪造物

translation: v. 放弃；停止；对…断念

translation: n. [数] 公式，准则；配方；婴儿食品

example: Moscow-based Kaspersky Lab has long been a magnet for Russia's young computer geniuses, luring them away from their usual forte, hacking, to viral analysis. 总部位于莫斯科的卡巴斯基实验室许久以来就是吸引俄罗斯年轻计算机英才的一块磁石，诱使他们远离自己平常的黑客特长，转而从事病毒分析。

translation: adj. 直率的；直截了当的；adv. 直率地；马上；立即；n. 直路

translation: v. 加强；增强；（酒）的酒精含量；设防于

translation: n. 刚毅；不屈不挠；勇气

n. 手势；姿势；示意动作
n. 姿态；手势；v. 作手势；用动作示意

translation: n. 乱语；快速而不清楚的言语

translation: v. 嘲笑；愚弄；n. 嘲讽话

example: a glacial valley 冰川谷

translation: adj. 草本的；绿色的；叶状的

example: a hilarious story 极有趣的故事

translation: v. 成为阻碍；adj. 后面的；n. (Hinder)人名；(芬)欣德
example: His career has been hindered by injury. 由于受伤，他的事业受到了阻碍。

translation: n. 障碍；妨碍；妨害；阻碍物
example: A degree is more of a hindrance than a help in British industry. 在英国工业界，学位反倒是个累赘。

translation: adj. 多毛的；[昆] 有粗毛的
example: Awarded to Manuel Barbeito at the Industrial Health and Safety Office in Maryland for scientific studies that found microbes cling to beards, making more hirsute men a potential laboratory hazard. 该奖项授予来自马里兰州工业卫生安全办公室的曼纽尔·巴尔贝托，他发现胡须上的微生物使多毛男人成为实验室的潜在危险。

translation: adj. 历史的；史学的；基于史实的
example: places of historical interest 历史名胜

translation: v. 积聚钱财；贮藏货物；n. 贮藏物
example: families who hoarded food during the strike 罢工期间囤积食品的家庭

translation: adj. 嘶哑的
example: He was hoarse from laughing. 他笑得嗓子都沙哑了。

translation: adj. 久远的，古老的；灰白的
example: Not that hoary old chestnut (= old idea, joke, remark etc ) again. 别再说那老掉牙的话了。

translation: n. 大杂烩；混煮；一团糟；vt. 使混乱
n. 敬意；尊敬；效忠
example: The film pays homage to Martin Scorsese’s ‘Mean Streets’. 该影片向马丁·斯科塞斯的《穷街陋巷》致敬。

translation: n. [生理] 体内平衡；[自] 内稳态
example: The return of the disequilibrated organ systems of the body to steady states or dynamic stability is known as homeostasis. 人们身体里失调的器官系统恢复到稳定的或动态稳定状态的过程被称为体内平衡。

translation: n. 说教；训诫
example: ...a receptive audience for his homily on moral values. ...乐于倾听他关于道德价值观说教的观众。

translation: n. 同质；同种；同次性（等于homogeneousness）
example: We can reduce this by avoiding homogeneity in group composition. 在群体成分中避免同质化，可以降低这种可能性。

translation: adj. 均匀的；[数] 齐次的；同种的；同类的，同质的
example: The unemployed are not a homogeneous group. 失业者并不都是同一类人。

translation: adj. 相应的；[生物] 同源的；类似的；一致的
example: There are so many important genes on every chromosome that the loss of both members of a homologous pair would be fatal, wouldn’t even get past embryonic development. 每一条染色体上都包含了数量巨大的重要基因，而同时丢失一对同源染色体将是致命的，生命甚至通不过胚胎发育期。

translation: [遗] 同源染色体
example: An aneuploid state in which a third homologous chromosome is present in addition to the normal autosomal pair is called trisomy. 除了正常染色体对以外，还存在有第二种同源染色体的非整倍体状态，被称为三体性。

translation: n. 同音异义词；同形异义词；同形同音异义词；同名异物
n. 磨刀石；想念；抱怨；v. 用磨刀石磨
example: Leading companies spend time and money on honing the skills of senior managers. 龙头公司会花费时间和金钱提高高层管理人员的技能。

translation: n. [生理] 激素，荷尔蒙
example: ...the male sex hormone testosterone. …男性性激素睾酮。

translation: adj. 热情友好的；（环境）舒适的
example: The local people were very kind and hospitable. 当地人非常友好热情。

translation: n. 敌意；战争行动
example: a cessation of hostilities 停战

translation: adj. 仁慈的，人道的；高尚的
example: the campaign for the humane treatment of criminals 提倡人道地对待罪犯的运动

translation: n. 人类；人道；仁慈；人文学科
example: We want a clean healthy environment for all humanity . 我们希望全人类拥有一个干净健康的生存环境。

translation: adj. 谦逊的；简陋的；（级别或地位）低下的；不大的；v. 使谦恭；轻松打败（尤指强大的对手）；低声下气
example: a modest and humble man 一个谦卑的男人

translation: n. 骗子；欺骗；谎话；v. 欺骗；哄骗
example: He dismissed the prime minister’s comments as ‘pure humbug’. 他对首相的评论不屑一顾，认为是“纯粹的假道学”。

translation: adj. 单调的；无聊的；n. 单调；乏味；vi. 单调乏味地进行
example: ...her lawyer husband, trapped in a humdrum but well-paid job. ...她整天做着单调乏味的工作但收入颇丰的律师丈夫。

translation: adj. 潮湿的；湿润的；多湿气的
example: Tokyo is extremely humid in mid-summer. 仲夏的东京十分潮湿。

translation: v. 羞辱；使…丢脸；耻辱
example: Her boss humiliated her in front of all her colleagues. 她的老板在所有同事面前羞辱了她。

translation: n. 谦卑，谦逊
example: ...a deep sense of humility. …深深的谦卑感。

translation: adj. 诙谐的，幽默的；滑稽的，可笑的
example: humorous stories 诙谐的故事

translation: adj. 第一百的；一百分之一的；n. 第一百，第一百个；百分之一
example: For example, if you say that something is "a few microns across", explain that a micron is one-millionth of a metre, and "about one hundredth the width of a human hair". 例如，如果您说某事物只有几微米，那么就要解释一微米是百万分之一米，大约是人头发宽度的百分之一。

translation: n. 飓风，暴风
example: The hurricane devastated a large section of the coast. 飓风毁坏了沿海地区的大部分。

translation: v. 催促；猛推；强夺；n. 推；奔忙；拥挤喧嚷
example: The guards hustled Harry out of the car. 卫兵们把哈里从车子里拉了出来。

translation: n. 小屋；临时营房；vt. 使住在小屋中；驻扎；vi. 住在小屋中；驻扎
example: a wooden hut 小木屋

translation: n. 水合物；氢氧化物；v. 使成水化合物
example: ...aluminium hydrate. ...氢氧化铝。

translation: adj. 液压的；水力的；水力学的
example: a hydraulic pump 水压泵，液压泵

translation: n. [有化] 碳氢化合物
example: There are several chemical processes that can change one hydrocarbon into another. 几个化攻过程就可以将一种碳氢化合物变成另一种。

translation: n. 氢氯酸，盐酸
example: The production of xylose via hydrolysis of straw in a mixture of formic acid and hydrochloric acid was investigated. 本文对甲酸-盐酸混合溶液水解麦草制备木糖的工艺进行研究。

translation: n. [化学] 氢
example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen. 水含有氢和氧。

translation: n. 水解作用
example: When water reacts with the fats and oils, a reaction called hydrolysis, the result is glycerol and soap. 当水与脂肪和油产生一种被称为水解的化学反应时，其产物是甘油与肥皂。

translation: n. [无化] 氢氧化物；羟化物
example: Treated with methanol and potassium hydroxide, also known as lye, the vegetable oil molecules break down. 植物油分子经过甲醇和钾的氢氧化物、也被称作灰汁的处理后就被分解。

translation: adj. 吹毛求疵的，苛评的
example: He's as big a geek as Zuckerberg, but of a different type: the hypercritical, even sometimes nasty type. 他与扎克伯格一样，是个超级极客，只不过是另一种类型的：他吹毛求疵，有时甚至令人讨厌。

translation: adj. 催眠的，催眠术的；易于催眠的；n. 安眠药；催眠状态的人
example: a hypnotic trance 催眠后的恍惚状态

translation: n. 虚伪；伪善
example: It would be sheer hypocrisy to pray for success, since I’ve never believed in God. 我从不相信上帝，因此为获成功而祈祷是纯粹的虚伪之举。

translation: n. 伪君子；伪善者
example: The magazine wrongly suggested he was a liar and a hypocrite. 该杂志错误地暗示他是个骗子和伪君子。

translation: adj. 虚伪的；伪善的
example: It would be hypocritical to say I travel at 70 mph simply because that is the law. 如果仅仅因为法律规定的时速是70英里我就说自己的行驶时速是70英里，那就太虚伪了。

translation: n. 皮下注射；皮下注射器；adj. 皮下的
example: He held up a hypodermic to check the dosage. 他举起皮下注射器检查药剂量。

translation: n. 直角三角形的斜边
example: I want to compute the length of the hypotenuse of a right triangle. 我想计算下,直角三角形的斜边。

translation: n. 假设
example: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving. 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

translation: adj. 歇斯底里的；异常兴奋的
example: Janet became hysterical and began screaming. 珍妮特歇斯底里起来，开始尖叫。

translation: n. 图标；偶像；肖像，画像；圣像
example: To open a new file, click on the icon. 要打开新文档，点击该图标。

translation: n. 偶像破坏者；提倡打破旧习的人
n. 空想家，理想主义者；唯心主义者；adj. 理想主义的；唯心主义的
example: This is a heated debate which involves materialist as opposed to idealist views. 这是一场唯物主义与唯心主义的大论战。

translation: v. 理想化；形成思想
example: Society continues to idealize the two-parent family. 社会依然把双亲家庭视为理想家庭。

translation: adj. 同一的；完全相同的；n. 完全相同的事物
example: four identical houses 四幢一模一样的房子

translation: adj. 闲置的；懒惰的；停顿的；v. 无所事事；虚度；空转
example: I cannot afford to leave the land lying idle. 我不能让土地闲置。

translation: n. 偶像崇拜；盲目崇拜；邪神崇拜
example: Their affection for her soon increased almost to idolatry. 他们对她的喜爱几乎发展成了盲目崇拜。

translation: n. 点火，点燃；着火，燃烧；点火开关，点火装置
example: The device automatically disconnects the ignition. 那个装置自动断开了点火器。

translation: adj. 不光彩的；卑鄙的；卑贱的
example: ignoble feelings of intense jealousy 可耻的极度妒忌感

translation: adj. 可耻的；下流的
example: an ignominious end to his career 他职业生涯不光彩的终结

translation: adj. [法] 非法的；违法的；违反规则的；n. 非法移民，非法劳工
example: illegal drugs 违禁药品

translation: adj. 难辨认的；字迹模糊的
example: His handwriting is totally illegible. 他的字迹完全无法辨认。

translation: adj. 文盲的；不识字的；没受教育的；n. 文盲
example: It was an illiterate letter, full of mistakes. 这封信文笔拙劣，错误连篇。

translation: v. 阐明，说明；照亮；使灿烂；用灯装饰
example: A single candle illuminated his face. 一支蜡烛照亮了他的脸。

translation: n. 幻觉，错觉；错误的观念或信仰
example: She was under no illusion that he loved her. 她不再幻想他爱她了。

translation: adj. 著名的，杰出的；辉煌的
example: She has had an illustrious career. 她已经有了辉煌的事业。

translation: n. 影像；想象；肖像；偶像；v. 想象；反映；象征；作…的像
example: She peered closely at her image in the mirror. 她仔细检视镜子中自己的映像。

translation: adj. 虚构的，假想的；想像的；虚数的
example: As she listened, she played an imaginary piano on her knees. 她边听边在膝盖上作弹钢琴状。

translation: adj. 富于想象的；有创造力的
example: an imaginative use of computer technology 计算机技术的妙用

translation: v. 吸收，接受；喝；吸入
example: Both men imbibed considerable quantities of gin. 这两个男人都喝了大量的杜松子酒。

translation: v. 灌输；使感染；使渗透
example: The film is imbued with the star's rebellious spirit. 这部电影充满了那位明星的反叛精神。

translation: v. 模仿，仿效；仿造，仿制
example: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill. 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

translation: adj. 完美的；洁净的；无瑕疵的
example: her immaculate stage performances 她完美的舞台表演

translation: adj. 立即的；直接的；最接近的
example: Our immediate response to the attack was sheer horror. 我们对攻击的第一反应就是非常惊恐。

translation: adj. 巨大的，广大的；无边无际的；非常好的
example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount. 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

translation: v. 沉浸；使陷入
example: The electrodes are immersed in liquid. 电极被浸没在液体中。

translation: v. 移入
example: His father and mother immigrated when he was two. 他的父母在他两岁时移民到这里。

translation: adj. 即将来临的；迫近的
example: A new trade agreement is imminent. 一项新的贸易协定即将签署。

translation: adj. 无节制的，过度的；不适中的
example: immoderate drinking 酗酒

translation: adj. 不道德的；邪恶的；淫荡的
example: Deliberately making people suffer is immoral. 故意使人吃苦头是不道德的。

translation: adj. 不朽的；神仙的；长生的；n. 神仙；不朽人物
example: Plato believed that the soul is immortal. 柏拉图认为灵魂不灭。

translation: adj. 免疫的；免于……的，免除的；n. 免疫者；免除者
example: Once we’ve had the disease, we’re immune for life. 我们一旦得过这种病，就获得了终身免疫力。

translation: n. 〔身体的〕免疫系统
example: My immune system is not as strong as it ought to be. 我的免疫力比较差。

translation: adj. 不变的；不可变的；不能变的
example: This decision should not be seen as immutable. 不该把这个决定看成是不可改变的。

translation: n. 影响；效果；碰撞；冲击力；v. 挤入，压紧；撞击；对…产生影响
example: The force of the impact knocked the breath out of her. 撞击力使她喘不过气来。

translation: v. 损害；削弱；减少
example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate. 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

translation: v. 刺穿；钉住；使绝望
example: Researchers observed one bird impale a rodent on a cactus. 研究人员观察到，一只鸟把一个啮齿动物钉到了一棵仙人掌上。

translation: adj. 感触不到的；难理解的；无形的
example: To the untrue man, the whole universe is false- it is impalpable- it shrinks to nothing within his grasp. 对那个不真实的人来说，整个宇宙都是虚伪的——都是难以触摸的，在他的把握之中化为子虚乌有。

translation: adj. 公平的，公正的；不偏不倚的
example: We offer impartial advice on tax and insurance. 我们就税收和保险问题提供公充的建议。

translation: n. 僵局；死路
example: Negotiations seemed to have reached an impasse. 谈判似乎陷入了僵局。

translation: adj. 充满激情的；感激的；v. 使充满激情（impassion的过去式和过去分词）
example: She appeared on television to make an impassioned plea for help. 她在电视上恳切地请求人们帮助。

translation: adj. 冷漠的；无感觉的
example: Her impassive face showed no reaction at all. 她表情冷淡，毫无反应。

translation: adj. 无瑕疵的；没有缺点的
example: She has taught her children impeccable manners. 她把她的孩子教育得举止十分得体。

translation: v. 阻碍；妨碍；阻止
example: Storms at sea impeded our progress. 海上风暴阻碍了我们的航程。

translation: v. 迫近；即将发生
example: This very recklessness makes me feel that these costly operations may be only the prelude to far larger events which impend on land. 这种孤注一掷的作法，使我感到这些代价重大的战役，也许正是陆上即将发生。

translation: n. 顽固的人；不知悔改的人；adj. 顽固的；不知悔改的
example: Endless, of the impenitent and unbelieving. 无止境的，对不知悔改的和不信。

translation: adj. 必要的，不可避免的；紧急的；命令的，专横的；势在必行的；[语]祈使的；n. 必要的事；命令；需要；规则；[语]祈使语气
example: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators. 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

translation: adj. 无感觉的；缺乏感知力的
v. 危及；使陷于危险
example: Tax increases now might imperil economic recovery. 目前提高税收可能会危及经济的复苏。

translation: adj. 专横的；迫切的；傲慢的
example: She raised her hand in an imperious gesture. 她傲慢地扬起手。

translation: adj. 不受影响的，无动于衷的；不能渗透的
example: impervious volcanic rock 不透水的火山岩

translation: adj. 冲动的；鲁莽的；猛烈的
example: He was high-spirited and impetuous. 他情绪高昂，行事鲁莽。

translation: n. 动力；促进；冲力
example: The discovery gave fresh impetus to the research. 这个发现为研究带来新动力。

translation: v. 撞击；侵犯
example: Yet if those systems seriously impinge on people’s freedom, many people will balk. 然而如果这些系统严重侵犯了人们的自由的话，许多人将会停滞不前。

translation: adj. 难以置信的，不像真实的
example: It’s not entirely implausible that a galaxy could be identical to our own. 某个星系和我们这个星系完全相同并非完全不可能。

translation: v. 实施，执行；实现，使生效；n. 工具，器具；手段
example: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions. 政府许诺要实施新的制度来控制金融贷款机构。

translation: v. 使卷入；涉及；暗指；影响
n. 含义；暗示；牵连，卷入；可能的结果，影响
example: This election has profound implications for the future of U.S. democracy. 对于美国民主的未来而言，这次选举影响深远。

translation: adj. 强求的，纠缠不休的
example: importunate demands 无理的要求

translation: adj. 无力的；无效的；虚弱的；阳萎的
example: Emergency services seem impotent in the face of such a disaster. 面对这种灾难，应急服务机构似乎无能为力。

translation: v. 使贫穷；使枯竭
example: Falling coffee prices have impoverished many developing economies. 咖啡价格下跌使很多发展中的经济面临困境。

translation: adj. 无法攻取的；不受影响的；要塞坚固的；不可受孕的
example: an impregnable fortress 坚不可摧的堡垒

translation: n. 印象；效果，影响；压痕，印记；感想；曝光（衡量广告被显示的次数。打开一个带有该广告的网页，则该广告的impression 次数增加一次）
example: When we looked around the school we got a very good impression. 我们参观了学校，对它的印象很好。

translation: n. 印记；痕迹；特征；版本说明；v. 加特征；刻上记号
example: She could see the imprint of her fingers on his pale face. 她可以看到自己的手指在他苍白的脸上留下的印痕。

translation: n. 即兴曲；即席演出；adv. 即席地；adj. 即席的
example: When do we make impromptu speeches? 我们什么时候要做即席演讲？

translation: n. 不适当；不正确；用词错误；[审计] 不正当行为
example: Accusations of impropriety were made against the company’s directors. 对公司董事不正当的行为提出了指控。

translation: adj. 轻率的，鲁莽的；不小心的
example: The banks made hundreds of imprudent loans in the 1970s. 20世纪70年代那几家银行轻率地发放了几百笔贷款。

translation: v. 指责，非难；抨击；反驳；对…表示怀疑
example: I did not mean to impugn her professional abilities. 我并不是怀疑她的专业能力。

translation: n. 冲动；[电子] 脉冲；刺激；神经冲动；推动力；vt. 推动
example: The eye converts light signals to nerve impulses. 眼睛把光信号转变成神经冲动。

translation: adj. 冲动的；受感情驱使的；任性的
example: Rosa was impulsive and sometimes regretted things she’d done. 罗莎性情鲁莽，有时会为做过的事感到后悔。

translation: n. 不受惩罚；无患；[法] 免罚
example: It’s astonishing that these criminals are free to walk the streets with impunity. 令人惊讶的是，这些罪犯可以招摇过市却依然逍遥法外。

translation: n. 杂质；不纯；不洁
example: All natural minerals contain impurities. 凡天然矿物都含有杂质。

translation: v. 归罪于，归咎于；嫁祸于
example: It is grossly unfair to impute blame to the United Nations. 把责任归咎于联合国是极不公平的。

translation: adj. 难达到的；难接近的；难见到的
example: In winter, the villages are inaccessible by road. 冬天时，进入这些村子的路很难走。

translation: adj. 疏忽的；不注意的（副词inadvertently）；无意中做的
example: The government has said it was an inadvertent error. 政府声称那是无意的过失。

translation: adj. 不可分割的；不可剥夺的；不能让与的
example: inalienable human rights 不可剥夺的人权

translation: adj. 不变的；不能变更的
example: This is the cultural play of signification that theorists have discussed as if it were an inalterable feature of life. 这就是理论家们谈论的意义的文化游戏，仿佛它是生活的固定不变的特性。

translation: adj. 天生的；先天的
example: Mammals have an inborn fear of snakes. 哺乳动物天生害怕蛇。

translation: adj. 辉耀的；炽热的；发白热光的
example: the invention of the incandescent lamp 白炽灯的发明

translation: n. 动机；刺激；adj. 激励的；刺激的
example: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team. 给最优秀的队发一瓶香槟作为额外的鼓励。

translation: n. 起初；获得学位
adj. 不断的；不停的；连续的
example: The child’s incessant talking started to irritate her. 这孩子喋喋不休，她开始烦躁起来。

translation: adj. 早期的；刚开始的；未充分发展的；vt. 开始；vi. 开始
example: His dreams were senseless and inchoate. 他的梦想毫无意义，很不成熟。

translation: n. 事件，事变；插曲；adj. [光] 入射的；附带的；易发生的，伴随而来的
example: Am I at risk because of some incident in my sexual past? 我过去性生活中的某件事会使我处于危险境地吗？

translation: v. 把……烧成灰；烧弃
example: All the infected clothing was incinerated. 所有沾染了细菌的衣服都被焚化了。

translation: adj. 初期的；初始的；起初的；发端的
example: a sign of incipient madness 精神失常的早期征兆

translation: adj. 深刻的；敏锐的；锋利的
example: He is a very shrewd operator with an incisive mind. 他是一位非常精明的经营者，有着敏锐的头脑。

translation: v. 煽动；激励；刺激
example: They were charged with inciting racial hatred. 他们被指控煽动种族仇恨。

translation: adj. 险恶的；气候严酷的；狂风暴雨的
n. 倾向，爱好；斜坡
example: My natural inclination was to say no. 我生性爱说“不”。

translation: adj. 包括的，包含的
example: Not everyone shares his vision of an inclusive America. 不是所有人都同意他的观点，认为美国是个包容性很强的国家。

translation: adj. 改名的；微行的；隐姓埋名的；adv. 隐姓埋名地；n. 匿名者；微行者
example: Hotel inspectors have to travel incognito. 酒店检查员巡查时必须隐瞒真实身份。

translation: adj. 不便的；狭窄的

translation: adj. 费解的；不可思议的；无限的
example: legal documents full of incomprehensible jargon 满是难懂术语的法律文件

translation: adj. 不协调的；不一致的；不和谐的
example: The new theatre looks utterly incongruous in its setting. 这座新剧院和周围的环境格格不入。

translation: adj. 不重要的；不合理的；不合逻辑的
example: inconsequential but amusing chatter 无谓但有趣的闲扯

translation: adj. 不一致的；前后矛盾的
example: The accounts of the witnesses are inconsistent. 几位目击者的说法不一致。

translation: adj. 无可争议的；无疑的；明白的
example: CCTV provided incontrovertible evidence that he was at the scene of the crime. 闭路电视提供了案发时他在犯罪现场的确凿证据。

translation: adj. 不便的；打扰的
example: Monday’s a bit inconvenient for me. How about Wednesday? 周一我不太方便，周三如何？

translation: v. 包含，吸收；体现；把……合并；adj. 合并的；一体化的；组成公司的
example: The new cars will incorporate a number of major improvements. 这种新型汽车将包含许多重大的改进。

translation: adj. 不可救药的；积习难改的；n. 不可救药的人
example: "Sunita, you are incorrigible!" he said. “苏尼塔，你真是屡教不改啊！”，他说道。

translation: adj. 怀疑的；不轻信的
example: ‘You sold the car?’ she asked, incredulous. “你把车卖了？”她难以置信地问道。

translation: v. 控告；暗示有罪
example: He claimed that the drugs had been planted to incriminate him. 他声称那些毒品是有人为了栽赃陷害他而放在那里的。

translation: n. 梦魇；沉重的负担
example: Joyce regarded his US citizenship as a moral and political incubus. 乔伊斯认为他的美国公民身份在道德上和政治上是很大的负担。

translation: adj. 无辜的；无可非议的
adj. 现任的；依靠的；负有职责的；n. 在职者；现任者；领圣俸者
adj. 负债的；感激的；受惠的；v. 使负债；使受恩惠（indebt的过去分词）
example: the 17 most heavily indebted nations 17个负债最重的国家

translation: adj. 无法解释的；破译不出的；难辨认的

translation: adv. 不确定地，无限期地；模糊地，不明确地

translation: adj. 难忘的；擦不掉的
example: Her words left an indelible impression on me for years to come. 她的话多年来我都难以忘怀。

translation: adj. 独立的；单独的；无党派的；不受约束的；n. 独立自主者；无党派者
example: There are plans to split the corporation into a number of smaller independent companies. 有计划要把这家大企业分割成一些独立的小公司。

translation: adj. 指示的；表示的；n. 指示物
n. 指示器；[试剂] 指示剂；[计] 指示符；压力计
example: All the main economic indicators suggest that trade is improving. 所有主要的经济指标都表明贸易情况正在改善。

translation: adj. 漠不关心的；无关紧要的；中性的，中立的
example: an indifferent cook 手艺平平的厨师

translation: n. 穷困；贫乏；贫穷
adj. 本土的；土著的；国产的；固有的
example: the many indigenous cultures which existed in Siberia 存在于西伯利亚的许多当地文化

translation: adj. 愤愤不平的；义愤的

translation: adj. 难识别的；看不见的
example: The path was almost indiscernible in the mist. 迷雾中小路依稀难辨。

translation: adj. 轻率的；不慎重的
example: It was very indiscreet of Colin to tell them about our plan. 科林把我们的计划告诉了他们，太不谨慎了。

translation: adj. 任意的；无差别的；不分皂白的

translation: adj. 明白的；无争论之余地的

translation: adj. 模糊的，不清楚的；朦胧的；难以清楚辨认的
example: She muttered something indistinct. 她含含糊糊地嘟哝了句什么。

translation: n. 懒散，懒惰；无痛
example: As the Cultural relics department warned, the security technology employed in the museum was seamless, so the major fault lay in the security guards’ irresponsibility and indolence. 正如文物部门警告，目前博物馆安保技术已无懈可击，但最大的漏洞在于人员的意识和责任心，懒惰成性。

translation: adj. 懒惰的；无痛的
example: The former investment banker has not been indolent: his department has been a factory for acronyms since the crisis began. 这位前投资银行家并非懒惰，自危机开始以来，他的部门已成为加工厂的代称。

translation: adj. 不屈不挠的；不服输的；不气馁的
example: an indomitable old lady 勇敢的老妇人

translation: adj. 不容置疑的；明确的
example: His brilliance renders this film an indubitable classic. 他的出色表现让这部电影成为了毋庸置疑的经典。

translation: v. 诱导；引起；引诱；感应
example: Patients with eating disorders may use drugs to induce vomiting. 患有进食障碍的人可使用药物催吐。

translation: v. 引导；感应；使…就职；征召入伍
adj. 放纵的；宽容的；任性的
example: toys bought by their indulgent grandparents 溺爱孩子的(外)祖父母买的玩具

translation: v. 灌醉；使陶醉；使兴奋；adj. 酒醉的；醉醺醺的；陶醉的；n. 酒鬼；醉汉
example: To rise thither with my inebriate Soul! 带着我的酒醉的灵魂向那里飞腾！

translation: adj. 无效的，不起作用的；徒劳无益的；n. 无用的人；无一技之长者
example: The mayor had become ineffectual in the struggle to clamp down on drugs. 该市长在打击毒品的斗争中行动不力。

translation: adj. 无用的；无效果的
example: When other modalities become inefficacious , Argon-helium knife still can get very good results. 其它方法都无效的情况下，氩氦刀依然取得非常好的效果。

translation: adj. 笨拙的；不适当的
example: inept leadership 拙劣的领导

translation: n. 不平等；不同；不平均
example: People are concerned about corruption and social inequality. 人们对腐败和社会不公感到担忧。

translation: n. 不公平，不公正
example: Social imbalance worries him more than inequity of income. 社会失衡比收入不公平更令他担忧。

translation: adj. [化学] 惰性的；呆滞的；迟缓的；无效的
example: inert gases 惰性气体

translation: n. [力] 惯性；惰性，迟钝；不活动

translation: adj. 无价的；难以估计的
example: a painting of inestimable value 一幅价值连城的画

translation: adj. 必然的，不可避免的
example: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable. 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

translation: adj. 不可原谅的；没法辩解的；不可宽恕的
example: an inexcusable act of aggression 不可饶恕的侵略行为

translation: adj. 无情的；不屈不挠的；不可阻挡的；无法改变的

translation: adj. 费解的；无法说明的；不能解释的
example: inexplicable behaviour 费解的行为

translation: adj. 声名狼藉的；无耻的；邪恶的；不名誉的
example: an infamous killer 臭名昭著的杀手

translation: n. 感染；传染；影响；传染病
example: The baby had an ear infection. 宝宝耳朵感染了。

translation: v. 骚扰；寄生于；大批出没；大批滋生
example: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops. …像蚜虫那样大肆侵害谷类作物的害虫。

translation: adj. 无穷小的；无限小的；极小的；n. 无限小；极微量；极小量
example: infinitesimal changes in temperature 气温极其微小的变化

translation: n. 医务室；医院；养老院
adj. 易燃的；易怒的；易激动的；n. 易燃物
example: Petrol is highly inflammable. 汽油高度易燃。

translation: adj. 炎症性的；煽动性的；激动的

translation: adj. 有影响的；有势力的；n. 有影响力的人物

translation: n. 流入；汇集；河流的汇集处
example: ...problems caused by the influx of refugees. …难民大量涌入所造成的问题。

translation: adj. 非正式的；不拘礼节的；随便的；通俗的；日常使用的
example: The atmosphere at work is fairly informal. 工作气氛相当轻松。

translation: n. 红外线；adj. 红外线的
example: Both the model and the satellite sensor use infrared energy to measure clouds. 模型和卫星传感器都使用红外能量来进行云的估算。

translation: v. 侵犯；违反；破坏
example: A backup copy of a computer program does not infringe copyright. 计算机程序的备份不侵犯版权。

translation: v. 激怒；使大怒；adj. 狂怒的
example: Her actions infuriated her mother. 她的举动使她母亲极为生气。

translation: v. 灌输；使充满；浸渍
adj. 有独创性的；机灵的，精制的；心灵手巧的
example: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators. 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

translation: adj. 天真的；坦白的；正直的；朴实的
example: He seemed too ingenuous for a reporter. 他好像太天真诚实，不适合做记者。

translation: adj. 忘恩的；不知恩的；n. 忘恩负义的人
example: She gathered her belongings and headed to the gate, refusing to look back at the ingrate thief. 她收拾好了行李，走向登机口，根本不想再看一眼那忘恩负义的小偷。

translation: v. 使迎合；使讨好；使逢迎
example: Many politicians are trying to ingratiate themselves with her. 很多政客都在试图讨她的欢心。

translation: n. 原料；要素；组成部分；adj. 构成组成部分的
example: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl. 把所有食材都放在一个大碗里。

translation: adj. 固有的；内在的；与生俱来的，遗传的
example: Every business has its own inherent risks. 每笔生意本身都有风险。

translation: n. 继承；遗传；遗产

translation: v. 抑制；禁止

translation: adj. 荒凉的；冷淡的，不好客的；不适居留的

translation: adj. 残忍的；野蛮的；无人性的
example: The refugees had suffered degrading and inhuman treatment. 难民遭受了侮辱性和非人的待遇。

translation: v. 埋葬；土葬
example: It's time to inhume the quondam and move above to a current tomorrow, " it says." 从现在开始，埋葬过去，走向新的明天。

translation: adj. 敌意的；有害的
example: But allowing vigilantes to even the score will only lead to a spiral of violence that is hard to stop and inimical to democratic evolution. 但是由治安委员会成员来弥补裂痕只能导致暴力事件的盘旋上升，这种事件又是难以遏制的，同时对民主进程又是极其有害的。

translation: v. 开始，创始；发起；使初步了解；n. 开始；新加入者，接受初步知识者；adj. 新加入的；接受初步知识的
example: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper. 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

translation: v. 注入；注射
example: His son was injected with strong drugs. 他的儿子被注射了强效的药。

translation: adj. 有害的；诽谤的
example: ...substances that are injurious to health. ...有害健康的物质。

translation: n. 暗示；略知；模糊概念；v. 暗示 （inkle的ing形式）；略知；低声说出
example: I had an inkling that she was pregnant. 我隐约知道她怀孕了。

translation: adj. 先天的；固有的；与生俱来的
example: Children have an innate ability to learn language. 儿童学习语言的能力是与生俱来的。

translation: adj. 无害的；无伤大雅的
example: an innocuous remark 无恶意的话

translation: v. 创新；改革；革新
example: the need for large businesses to innovate 大公司革新的需要

translation: adj. 革新的，创新的；新颖的；有创新精神的

translation: adj. 无数的，数不清的
example: She’s served on innumerable committees. 她在多个委员会担任委员。

translation: adj. 过度的；无节制的；紊乱的
example: They spend an inordinate amount of time talking. 他们聊天时间长得超乎想像。

translation: n. 投入；输入电路；v. [自][电子] 输入；将…输入电脑
example: If the input data specified it, the file will close and the process terminates. 如果输入数据指定，该文件就会关闭，数据处理终止。

translation: adj. 贪得无厌的；不知足的
example: A section of the reading public has an insatiable appetite for dirty stories about the famous. 阅读大众中有一部分人对名人的风流韵事的欲望总是无法满足。

translation: adj. 神秘的；不可理解的；不能预测的；不可思议的
example: He stood silent and inscrutable. 他静静地站着，让人难以捉摸。

translation: adj. 无感觉的；无情的；无生命的
example: an insensate hatred of America 对美国缺乏理性的仇恨

translation: adj. 昏迷的；无知觉的；麻木不仁的
example: He fell to the ground, insensible. 他跌倒在地，失去了知觉。

translation: adj. 阴险的；隐伏的；暗中为害的；狡猾的
example: an insidious trend towards censorship of the press 实行新闻审查的潜在趋势

translation: n. 洞察力；洞悉
example: a woman of great insight 一位极有眼光的妇女

translation: adj. 有深刻见解的，富有洞察力的
example: an insightful analysis 有见地的分析

translation: adj. 无关紧要的
example: In 1949 Bonn was a small, insignificant city. 1949年，波恩还是个不足称道的小城市。

translation: v. 暗示；使逐渐而巧妙地取得；使迂回地潜入
example: What are you trying to insinuate? 你想暗示什么？

translation: adj. 清淡的；无趣的
example: an insipid pasta dish 一盘没有味道的意大利面食

translation: adj. 无礼的；傲慢的；粗野的；无耻的
example: an insolent tone of voice 傲慢的语气

translation: n. 无忧无虑；漫不经心；满不在乎
example: an air of insouciance 无忧无虑的神态

translation: n. 视察，检查
example: An inspection was carried out at the school. 有人来学校视察了一遍。

translation: n. 灵感；鼓舞；吸气；妙计
example: The Malvern Hills have provided inspiration for many artists and musicians over the decades. 几十年来，莫尔文丘陵为很多艺术家和音乐家提供了灵感。

translation: v. 激发；鼓舞；启示；产生；使生灵感
example: We need someone who can inspire the team. 我们需要一个能鼓舞团队士气的人。

translation: adj. 鼓舞人心的；灌输的；启发灵感的；v. 鼓舞；激发；使感悟（inspire的ing形式）
example: inspiring music 激励人心的音乐

translation: n. 实例；情况；建议；v. 举为例
example: We need to rethink the way we consume energy. Take, for instance, our approach to transport. 我们需要重新考虑我们使用能源的方式，例如我们的运输方式。

translation: adj. 立即的；紧急的；紧迫的；n. 瞬间；立即；片刻
example: an instant success 马到成功

translation: adj. 瞬间的；即时的；猝发的
example: modern methods of instantaneous communication 现代的即时通信方法

translation: v. 唆使；煽动；教唆；怂恿

adj. 猖獗的；蔓延的；狂暴的；奔放的；n. (Rampant)人名；(法)朗庞
